title: Bayesian phase transition for the critical Ising model: Enlarged replica symmetry in the epsilon expansion and in 2D
summary: A process that images or measures bond energies in the critical Ising model can be in distinct measurement ``phases'', depending on the precision of measurement. We study the transition into the strong-measurement phase using replica field theory (an epsilon expansion around six dimensions) and numerical simulations in two dimensions. The results reveal multiscaling of correlation functions at the critical point, and a striking enlarged symmetry of the replica description. This is an analog of the Nishimori phenomenon in the Ising spin glass, in a distinct replica limit. The enlarged symmetry is present microscopically for certain measurement protocols, but more generally can emerge in the infrared, and it fixes the exact value of the exponent for the Edwards-Anderson correlator both in 2D and near the upper critical dimension. We also examine the epsilon expansion for models with power-law interactions and/or long-range measurement.

AI.tldr: 本文研究临界伊辛模型中测量键能的相变过程，通过复制场理论和数值模拟发现测量精度导致的强测量相变、多尺度关联现象以及对称性增强，并精确计算了Edwards-Anderson关联函数指数。
AI.motivation: 探究临界伊辛模型中测量键能过程所呈现的不同测量"相"，特别是从弱测量到强测量相变的临界行为及其普适类性质。
AI.method: 采用复制场理论（六维附近的epsilon展开）结合二维数值模拟，分析测量相变中的多尺度关联现象和对称性结构。
AI.result: 发现临界点处关联函数呈现多尺度行为；复制描述的对称性显著增强（类似伊辛自旋玻璃中的Nishimori现象但在不同复制极限下）；在二维和上临界维度附近精确确定了Edwards-Anderson关联函数指数。
AI.conclusion: 测量精度可导致不同的测量相，增强的对称性在某些测量协议下微观存在或在红外区涌现，为理解测量诱导相变提供了新的理论框架。

title: Beyond average: heterogeneous first-passage dynamics in many-particle systems with resetting
summary: We study how stochastic resetting affects first-passage processes in systems of many interacting particles. While resetting is well understood for single-particle dynamics, its consequences for collective behavior remain less clear. We consider a protocol in which all surviving particles are reset to the position of the most extreme one, motivated by problems in artificial selection and avoidance. Using stochastic simulations of particles diffusing in a confining potential with an absorbing boundary, we examine two notions of arrival: when the first particle reaches the boundary and the point at which half of the particles do. We find that resetting produces broad distributions of arrival times with heavy tails and extended plateaus that span several orders of magnitude. As the resetting rate increases, the mean arrival time grows and diverges beyond a threshold. Trajectory-level analysis also reveals strong heterogeneity, with very short and very long absorption times. These results show that collective resetting lacks a single characteristic time scale and that the definition of arrival is crucial for understanding and controlling such systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机重置对多粒子相互作用系统中首次通过过程的影响，发现集体重置会导致到达时间分布出现重尾和平台，平均到达时间随重置率增加而发散，系统缺乏单一特征时间尺度。
AI.motivation: 随机重置在单粒子动力学中研究充分，但其对多粒子集体行为的影响尚不明确，作者受人工选择和规避问题的启发，探究集体重置对首次到达过程的影响。
AI.method: 采用随机模拟，研究在受限势阱中扩散的粒子系统（带吸收边界），将所有存活粒子重置到最极端粒子的位置，考察两种到达定义（首个粒子到达边界和半数粒子到达边界）下的行为。
AI.result: 重置产生具有重尾和宽平台的到达时间分布（跨越数个数量级）；平均到达时间随重置率增加而增长并在阈值处发散；轨迹层面表现出强异质性，存在极短和极长的吸收时间。
AI.conclusion: 集体重置缺乏单一特征时间尺度，到达的定义对理解和控制此类系统至关重要。

title: Thermodynamic Parametrisation of the Vertebrate Lifetime Cycle Invariant: Biological Proper Time, Allometric Mass-Cancellation, and Clade-Specific Predictions
summary: Warm-blooded vertebrates accumulate approximately $\Nstar \approx 10^9$ cardiac cycles over a natural lifetime, a striking empirical regularity first quantified by Lindstedt and Calder yet lacking a physical interpretation. We propose that this invariance is consistent with a conserved thermodynamic budget, formulated here as the Principle of Biological Time Equivalence (PBTE). The framework rests on a constitutive closure $\dotΣ = σ_0 f$, which links the entropy production rate to the intrinsic physiological frequency; integration over the lifespan yields $Σ_{\mathrm{life}} = σ_0 \Nstar$, so that the observed constancy of $\Nstar$ corresponds to an approximately constant lifetime entropy budget. Algebraic exponent cancellation under Kleiber and Calder scaling laws, $\sigstar \propto M^{3/4+1/4-1}=M^0$, is consistent with mass-independence and reproduces the numerical value $N_0 \approx 1.52\times10^9$ without free parameters. The framework offers a thermodynamically consistent account of two outstanding problems: the origin of the numerical value of $\Nstar$ and the systematic deviations observed across clades. A multiplicative correction factor $Φ_C$, constructed from physiological determinants -- activity allocation, body temperature, mitochondrial efficiency, and extrinsic hazard -- predicts long-lived clades as regimes of reduced effective entropy production per cardiac cycle.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了生物时间等价原理（PBTE），认为恒温脊椎动物一生约10^9次心跳的恒定性源于保守的热力学预算，即寿命总熵产恒定。通过克莱伯和卡尔德标度律的代数指数对消，解释了该数值的无质量依赖性，并引入校正因子Φ_C预测不同类群的寿命偏差。
AI.motivation: 解释恒温脊椎动物一生心跳次数恒为约10^9这一经验规律（Lindstedt-Calder定律）缺乏物理机制的问题，并为其提供热力学基础。
AI.method: 建立PBTE框架，将熵产率与生理频率通过本构关系Ṡ=σ₀f关联；利用克莱伯定律（代谢率∝M^(3/4)）和卡尔德定律（生理频率∝M^(-1/4)）的指数对消（3/4+(-1/4)-1=0）实现质量无关性；引入Φ_C校正因子综合活动、体温、线粒体效率和外部风险。
AI.result: 推导出N₀≈1.52×10^9的无参数数值；解释了心跳恒定性的热力学起源；Φ_C因子可预测长寿类群为每心跳周期有效熵产降低的群体。
AI.conclusion: 生命心跳数的恒定性可归结为热力学第二定律下的熵预算约束，为跨物种寿命差异提供了统一的热力学框架。

title: Energetics of stochastic limit-cycle oscillators: when does coupling reduce dissipation?
summary: Non-linear oscillators serve important functions in many biological systems, including within the inner ear and neuronal networks. The sustainment of oscillations in noisy environments requires continuous energy dissipation, quantified by the steady-state entropy production rate (EPR). We study an idealized, analytically tractable model of a stochastic circular limit cycle and examine how mutual coupling in pairs and populations alters dissipation. For a single oscillator, the EPR depends on three key factors: intrinsic frequency, tangential velocity fluctuations, and mean tangential velocity. The dynamics are characterized by a dimensionless effective temperature given by the ratio of intrinsic relaxation and diffusion timescales. For radial (amplitude), phase (Kuramoto-like), and Cartesian couplings, we derive analytical expressions for the EPR and confirm them numerically. Varying the effective temperature and system size strongly influences how the EPR depends on coupling strength and, in some cases, results in qualitatively distinct behaviors. Moreover, the coupling types affect the tangential velocity distributions differently. Notably, in all cases studied, Cartesian coupling reduces the EPR relative to the uncoupled system, irrespective of effective temperature and system size. The analysis of idealized non-linear oscillators reveals that different classes of coupling interactions and competing timescales present in the oscillators have distinct effects on energy dissipation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析理想化的随机极限环模型，研究了非线性振荡器在噪声环境下的稳态熵产生率（EPR）。研究发现，单个振荡器的EPR取决于本征频率、切向速度波动和平均切向速度三个关键因素。通过推导径向、相位（Kuramoto型）和笛卡尔耦合下的EPR解析表达式，发现笛卡尔耦合在所有情况下均能降低EPR，而有效温度和系统大小会显著影响EPR对耦合强度的依赖性。
AI.motivation: 非线性振荡器在生物系统中（如内耳和神经网络）具有重要功能，但噪声环境下持续振荡需要不断耗散能量。作者希望理解不同耦合类型如何影响振荡器系统的能量耗散，即稳态熵产生率。
AI.method: 建立理想化的随机极限环模型，引入无量纲有效温度（本征弛豫时间与扩散时间之比）。针对径向耦合、相位（Kuramoto型）耦合和笛卡尔耦合三种类型，推导EPR的解析表达式，并通过数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 1) 单个振荡器EPR由本征频率、切向速度波动和平均切向速度决定；2) 有效温度和系统大小强烈影响EPR对耦合强度的依赖性，有时表现出定性不同的行为；3) 不同耦合类型对切向速度分布影响不同；4) 笛卡尔耦合在所有情况（无论有效温度和系统大小）下均降低EPR。
AI.conclusion: 不同类型的耦合相互作用和振荡器中存在的竞争时间尺度对能量耗散具有不同影响。笛卡尔耦合是一种普遍降低耗散的耦合方式，这对理解生物振荡器网络在噪声环境下的能量效率具有启示意义。

title: Visualizing Vortex Cluster Dynamics in the Weak Type-II Superconductor CaSb$_2$
summary: Scanning SQUID imaging of CaSb$_2$ reveals dense vortex clusters with enhanced boundary susceptibility and suppressed internal vortex motion, which features inconsistent with both isolated vortex and flux tube behaviors. These measurements provide the first local visualization of magnetic dynamics within vortex clusters in a weakly pinned superconductor, offering a new route to probe non-monotonic vortex-vortex interactions that are typically expected in single-band type-II/1 or multiband type-1.5 superconductors. Although the superfluid density follows a single-gap BCS model and the Ginzburg-Landau parameter of CaSb$_2$ lies slightly outside the type-II/1 regime, vortex clustering and spatially inhomogeneous dynamics are clearly observed, indicating physics beyond existing microscopic theories for single-band superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过扫描SQUID成像技术观测到CaSb₂中致密涡旋团簇表现出增强的边界磁化率与抑制的内部涡旋运动，这些特征既不符合孤立涡旋行为也不符合磁通管行为，揭示了弱钉扎超导体中涡旋团簇的磁动力学，为探测非单调涡旋-涡旋相互作用提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 现有理论无法解释CaSb₂中观测到的涡旋成团现象，其Ginzburg-Landau参数略超出type-II/1超导体范围，但涡旋团簇与空间不均匀动力学行为暗示存在超越现有单带超导体微观理论的新物理。
AI.method: 利用扫描SQUID成像技术对CaSb₂进行局域磁成像，直接可视化涡旋团簇内部的磁动力学。
AI.result: 发现致密涡旋团簇具有增强的边界磁化率和抑制的内部涡旋运动，超流密度符合单能隙BCS模型，但涡旋成团行为与单带超导体理论预期不符。
AI.conclusion: CaSb₂中观测到的涡旋成团与空间不均匀动力学表明存在超越现有单带超导体理论的新物理机制，可能与非单调涡旋-涡旋相互作用有关，为研究type-II/1或multiband type-1.5超导体提供了新视角。

title: Charge order, domain order, ideal mixing and absence of demixing in 2D binary mixtures of alcohols
summary: Binary mixtures of two dimensional, site-based models of alcohols are investigated by computer simulations, with a focus on ideal mixing, local clustering and miscibility trends. Four representative systems are considered: methanol/ethanol, butanol/pentanol, methanol/pentanol, and methanol/octanol. The models retain chemical specificity, while allowing to investigate dimensional constraints and uncover non/trivial micro/structurations. Two unexpected results are observed. First, mixtures of short and long alcohols are well mixed, instead of the macroscopic phase separation found in their three-dimensional counterparts. Second, ideality and micro phase separation compete within the chain like polar head aggregates. These behaviors cannot be explained solely by enhanced fluctuations in two dimensions, and instead point to a key role of charge ordering in shaping the local structure. The resulting interplay between concentration fluctuations and micro heterogeneous aggregation is analyzed through snapshots, site/site distribution functions, structure factors and Kirkwood Buff integrals. In particular, the analysis reveals that the domain correlations in the long range part of the correlations have an intriguing non self averaging behaviour, similar to that found in the real systems, indicating that mixtures of associating molecules are not ruled by conventional fluctuations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算机模拟研究了二维格点酒精混合物的混合行为，发现短链与长链酒精混合物在二维中表现良好（无宏观相分离），且极性头基团内部存在理想性与微相分离的竞争，这些现象归因于电荷有序化而非单纯的维度效应。
AI.motivation: 探究二维限制条件下不同链长醇类混合物的混合行为、微观结构与非平凡相行为，揭示维度降低对缔合液体混合热力学的影响机制。
AI.method: 采用具有化学特异性的二维格点模型，对甲醇/乙醇、丁醇/戊醇、甲醇/戊醇、甲醇/辛醇四种二元混合物进行计算机模拟，结合快照、位点间分布函数、结构因子和Kirkwood-Buff积分进行分析。
AI.result: 发现两个意外结果：1) 短链与长链醇混合物在二维中均匀混合，无宏观相分离；2) 极性头基团内存在理想性与微相分离的竞争。域相关性在长程部分表现出非自平均行为。
AI.conclusion: 二维醇混合物的异常行为不能仅由增强的涨落解释，电荷有序化在塑造局域结构中起关键作用；缔合分子混合物的涨落不遵循常规统计行为。

title: Visons in Kitaev Spin Liquids with Majorana Fermi Surfaces
summary: The excitation spectrum of Kitaev quantum spin liquids consists of itinerant Majorana fermions, which can be gapless or gapped, and vortices of a $\mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge field, known as visons, which are always gapped. In this work, we investigate visons in Kitaev-type models where the Majorana fermions form a Fermi surface. In this case, the creation of a vison pair is analogous to introducing a local impurity potential in a metal. Since the gapless modes lead to strong finite-size effects, we compare the numerical calculation of the vison gap on finite lattices with the result from an analytical approach based on Green's function techniques. We find that the vison gap decreases as the size of the Fermi surface increases, signalling an instability of the quantum spin liquid ground state. We also show that larger Fermi surfaces tend to suppress the change in local spin correlations due to the Majorana-vison scattering potential.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Kitaev型量子自旋液体中vison激发，发现Majorana费米子形成费米面时，vison能隙随费米面增大而减小，表明量子自旋液体基态不稳定，且大费米面会抑制自旋关联的变化。
AI.motivation: 探究Kitaev型量子自旋液体中，当Majorana费米子形成费米面时，vison激发（Z₂规范场涡旋）的行为及其对基态稳定性的影响。
AI.method: 结合有限格点数值计算（vison能隙）与基于格林函数技术的解析方法，对比分析vison激发特性，研究费米面大小对vison能隙和局部自旋关联的影响。
AI.result: vison能隙随费米面增大而减小，暗示量子自旋液体基态不稳定；较大费米面会抑制由Majorana-vison散射势引起的局部自旋关联变化。
AI.conclusion: 在Majorana费米子形成费米面的Kitaev模型中，vison激发会导致量子自旋液体基态不稳定，且费米面越大，这种不稳定性越显著。

title: Terahertz magneto-nanoscopy of encapsulated monolayer graphene
summary: This study investigates the nanoscale conductivity of encapsulated monolayer graphene at temperatures down to 5 K and magnetic fields of up to 1 T. We use the scattering-type scanning near-field optical microscopy (s-SNOM) technique to probe magnetic-field-dependent responses from graphene close to charge neutrality in the terahertz spectral region. We observe the near-perfect high-$q$ reflector behavior of graphene but with subtle changes by the presence of magnetic fields. Measurements align with calculations of the magneto-optical conductivity and the near-field spectroscopic contrast that describes the field-tunable cyclotron resonance of Dirac fermions. Our result provides an initial step toward understanding temperature and magnetic-field effects on nanoscale terahertz transport in two-dimensional quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用散射式扫描近场光学显微镜（s-SNOM）在5K低温和高达1T的磁场条件下，探测了单层石墨烯在太赫兹波段的纳米尺度电导率，观察到石墨烯近乎完美的反射行为以及磁场可调的回旋共振效应。
AI.motivation: 探索低温（5K）和磁场（高达1T）对单层石墨烯在太赫兹波段纳米尺度电输运性质的影响，弥补当前对二维量子材料在极端条件下纳米尺度太赫兹行为理解的不足。
AI.method: 使用散射式扫描近场光学显微镜（s-SNOM）技术，在5K低温和高达1T的磁场下，对接近电荷中性点的单层石墨烯进行太赫兹波段的近场响应探测，并将实验结果与磁光导电率和近场光谱对比度的理论计算进行比对。
AI.result: 观察到石墨烯近乎完美的高q反射体行为，但在磁场存在下出现细微变化。实验测量与描述狄拉克费米子回旋共振的磁光导电率和近场光谱对比度计算结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为理解温度和磁场对二维量子材料中纳米尺度太赫兹输运的影响提供了初步基础，展示了通过磁场调控石墨烯太赫兹响应的可行性。

title: Dynamical stability and multifunctional properties of Ni2+/Pr3+ co-doped CsPbCl3 perovskite: insights from first-principles lattice dynamics and carrier transport
summary: All inorganic halide perovskites offer promising optoelectronic properties at low cost, but their structural softness and thermal instability limit applications. Density functional theory using the FP-LAPW method (WIEN2k) was used to study Ni2+/Pr3+ co-doping in CsPbCl3. Results show Ni2+ substitutes for Pb2+ at the B-site and Pr3+ for Cs at the A-site, keeping charge balance. Co-doping stabilizes the lattice, raises formation energies of halogen and metal vacancies, and reduces deep defect levels in the band gap. Phonon dispersion confirms that both pristine and co-doped CsPbCl3 are dynamically stable. Ni2+/Pr3+ co-doping suppresses low-energy vibrations and causes mode splitting in the 3 to 5 THz range, increasing phonon scattering and lowering lattice thermal conductivity. Mechanical analysis reveals higher elastic constants and bulk modulus, while ductility remains unchanged. Electronic structure calculations reveal Ni-3d and Pr-4f states at the band edges, reducing effective carrier mass and passivating vacancy states. Optical absorption is red-shifted, and the high-frequency (ε = 2.4) and low-frequency (ε = 7.4) dielectric constants are distinct. Transport analysis finds higher carrier mobility due to lighter effective masses. Altogether, Ni2+/Pr3+ co-doping reduces defect concentrations and improves the optoelectronic properties of CsPbCl3.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算研究Ni²⁺/Pr³⁺共掺杂CsPbCl₃，发现共掺杂可稳定晶格、提高缺陷形成能、降低有效质量、增强载流子迁移率并红移光学吸收，从而改善其光电性能。
AI.motivation: 全无机卤化物钙钛矿虽有优良光电特性且成本低廉，但其结构软度大、热稳定性差，限制了实际应用。为此，研究者希望通过Ni²⁺/Pr³⁺共掺杂策略来提升CsPbCl₃的结构稳定性和光电性能。
AI.method: 采用基于FP-LAPW方法的密度泛函理论（WIEN2k软件），对Ni²⁺/Pr³⁺共掺杂的CsPbCl₃进行系统研究。Ni²⁺占据Pb²⁺的B位，Pr³⁺占据Cs⁺的A位，保持电荷平衡。通过声子色散、力学性能、电子结构、光学吸收及输运性质等多维度计算分析评估掺杂效果。
AI.result: 共掺杂稳定了晶格，提高了卤素和金属空位的形成能，减少了带隙中的深缺陷能级；声子色散显示体系保持动力学稳定，且共掺杂抑制了低频振动并在3-5 THz范围内发生模式分裂，增大了声子散射并降低了晶格热导率；力学分析显示弹性常数和体积模量增大，延展性不变；电子结构方面，Ni-3d和Pr-4f态出现在带边，降低了有效载流子质量并钝化了空位态；光学吸收发生红移，高频（ε=2.4）和低频（ε=7.4）介电常数区分明显；输运分析显示更轻的有效质量带来更高的载流子迁移率。
AI.conclusion: Ni²⁺/Pr³⁺共掺杂能有效降低CsPbCl₃中的缺陷浓度，同时改善其光电性能，为全无机钙钛矿材料的稳定性提升和性能优化提供了有效策略。

title: On mathematical characterization of a Bessel functions-based passive element in electronic circuits
summary: Modeling relaxation phenomena in complex media is central to understanding multiscale dynamics in materials science, bioengineering and condensed matter physics. Existing fractional-order models, while flexible, sometimes lack physical interpretability, closed-form time-domain expressions, and compatibility with physically realizable architectures. In this work, we propose a novel passive element whose impedance and admittance are defined analytically via modified Bessel functions of first kind, through the electro-mechanical analogy. This approach preserves key physical properties such as analyticity, passivity, BIBO (bounded-input, bounded-output) stability and monotonicity, while enabling the direct use of its time-domain representation in simulations and system modeling. As an application, we demonstrate that this model accurately captures the broadband dispersive behavior of biological tissues, offering a physically grounded and tractable alternative to fractional-order formulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于修正贝塞尔函数的新型无源元件模型，用于描述复杂介质中的弛豫现象，该模型具有解析性、无源性、BIBO稳定性和单调性，能准确模拟生物组织的宽带色散行为，为分数阶模型提供物理可解释的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有分数阶弛豫模型虽灵活但缺乏物理可解释性、闭式时域表达式以及与可实现物理架构的兼容性，需要一种兼具物理基础与计算便利性的替代模型。
AI.method: 通过机电类比，利用第一类修正贝塞尔函数解析定义新型无源元件的阻抗和导纳，并严格验证其解析性、无源性、BIBO稳定性和单调性。
AI.result: 该模型能够准确捕捉生物组织的宽带色散行为，且其闭式时域表示可直接用于仿真和系统建模。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为分数阶公式提供了物理上合理且易于处理的替代方案，兼具理论严谨性与实际应用价值。

title: Generalized flux-weighted boundary walls in kinetic models
summary: We present a technique to investigate the stationary states of a system of a collisionless system confined by an external potential and coupled to boundary reservoirs through prescribed reinjection rules. We consider a family of boundary conditions parametrized by an integer $n$, corresponding to different velocity distributions imposed at the boundaries, generalizing the standard flux-weighted Maxwellian scheme. By combining Liouville's theorem with the boundary injection rule, we derive an explicit analytical expression for the stationary distribution function. This framework provides a direct link between microscopic boundary dynamics and macroscopic stationary profiles. We show that thermal equilibrium is recovered only for the standard flux-weighted injection method, while for all other cases the system relaxes to manifestly non-thermal stationary states. The resulting density and temperature profiles exhibit non-trivial spatial structures, including non-monotonic behaviour and temperature gradients induced by the boundary conditions alone. Analytical predictions for stationary moments are obtained in closed form for representative cases and are nicely reproduced by particle-based numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种研究受外部势约束、通过边界注入规则与储库耦合的无碰撞系统稳态的方法。通过结合刘维尔定理与边界注入规则，推导了稳态分布函数的解析表达式，发现仅标准通量加权麦克斯韦方案能恢复热平衡，其他情况系统会弛豫到非热稳态，产生非平凡的密度和温度空间结构。
AI.motivation: 建立微观边界动力学与宏观稳态分布之间的直接联系，统一理解不同边界注入条件对无碰撞系统稳态行为的影响，揭示边界条件本身如何诱导非平衡稳态。
AI.method: 考虑由整数n参数化的一族边界条件（不同速度分布），结合刘维尔定理与边界注入规则，推导稳态分布函数的解析表达式；对代表性情况得到稳态矩的封闭解析解，并通过基于粒子的数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 仅标准通量加权注入方法能恢复热平衡；其他边界条件导致系统弛豫到非热稳态，密度和温度分布呈现非单调行为及由边界条件单独诱导的温度梯度；解析预测与数值模拟吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功建立了微观边界动力学与宏观稳态分布之间的直接联系，为理解边界驱动非平衡系统提供了解析工具，且指出非通量加权注入是产生非热稳态的充分条件。

title: Persistent Fermi Pockets and Robust Electron Pairing in Lightly Doped CuO$_2$ Planes of Cuprate Superconductors
summary: High temperature superconductivity in cuprate superconductors is generally considered to be generated from doping the Mott insulators. The fundamental nature of the doped parent compounds as well as the microscopic origin of electron pairing remain critical issues in understanding the emergence of superconductivity. Here, using high-resolution spatially-resolved laser angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, we investigate the intrinsic electronic structures of the CuO$_2$ planes in multilayer cuprates Bi$_2$Sr$_2$Ca$_{n-1}$Cu$_n$O$_{2n+4+δ}$ (n=5$\sim$8). The inner CuO$_2$ planes are well shielded from the disorders and provide a rare and ideal platform to probe the intrinsic electronic phase diagram. We observe well-defined Fermi pockets with hole doping levels as low as 0.007, demonstrating an abrupt transition from the parent Mott insulator to a metallic state upon the introduction of an infinitesimal amount of doping. The innermost CuO$_2$ planes (IP$_0$) display gapless Fermi pockets, while the second innermost planes (IP$_1$) exhibit anisotropic superconducting gaps up to $\sim$33$\,$meV, indicative of robust electron pairing coexisting with strong antiferromagnetic order. Our findings provide a revised framework for understanding the doping-driven transitions and pairing mechanisms in cuprate superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文利用高分辨率空间分辨激光角分辨光电子能谱，研究了多层铜氧化物超导体Bi₂Sr₂Ca_{n-1}Cu_nO_{2n+4+δ}（n=5~8）中CuO₂面的本征电子结构。内层CuO₂面因受到良好屏蔽而成为研究本征电子相图的理想平台。研究发现，在极低掺杂水平（0.007）下，体系便从母体Mott绝缘体突变为金属态，最内层CuO₂面（IP₀）呈现无能隙费米口袋，而次内层（IP₁）则显示出各向异性的超导能隙（高达~33 meV），表明在强反铁磁序共存下仍存在强电子配对。
AI.motivation: 理解铜氧化物超导体中掺杂母体的基本性质以及电子配对的微观起源，是解决超导电性涌现机制的关键问题。
AI.method: 使用高分辨率空间分辨激光角分辨光电子能谱（laser ARPES），研究多层铜氧化物中内层CuO₂面的本征电子结构。
AI.result: 观察到掺杂水平低至0.007时形成清晰的费米口袋，表明从Mott绝缘体到金属态的突变；最内层CuO₂面（IP₀）为无能隙费米口袋，次内层CuO₂面（IP₁）显示高达~33 meV的各向异性超导能隙。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为理解铜氧化物超导体中掺杂驱动的相变和配对机制提供了新的修正框架。

title: Effects of Porous Media Properties and Flow Environment on Drug Release from Porous Implants
summary: Drug-Filled Porous Implants (DFPIs) are an innovative solution for delivering drugs in a controlled and sustained manner to target sites. To optimize their performance across various physiological conditions, it is essential to understand how fluid flow and porous media properties influence the drug release process. In this work, we numerically investigate a wide range of flow conditions and their effects on drug release from DFPI. The DFPI is modeled as a homogeneous, saturated porous medium, with flow through the porous structure modeled using the Forchheimer-extended Darcy law. Drug diffusion within the DFPI and its transport through the surrounding channel are simulated using a diluted species transport approach. The results reveal the impact of flow conditions and porous media characteristics on the drug release profile of the implant and drug availability within the channel. The variations in drug release behavior are analyzed by modeling the release as an apparent first-order process with a time-dependent rate constant. Notably, the results highlight specific conditions under which the rate constant increases during the later stages of drug release from the DFPI, particularly at high Reynolds numbers, while also ensuring a prolonged operational time period of the implant. These findings suggest the potential for developing intelligent DFPI designs capable of delivering drugs in a manner more attuned to the specific needs of the application.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟研究了载药多孔植入物在不同流体流动和多孔介质特性下的药物释放行为，发现高雷诺数条件下药物释放速率常数在后期增加，同时保证较长的运行时间，为设计智能载药多孔植入物提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 为优化载药多孔植入物在不同生理条件下的性能，需要理解流体流动和多孔介质特性如何影响药物释放过程。
AI.method: 将DFPI建模为均质饱和多孔介质，采用Forchheimer扩展达西定律模拟多孔结构中的流动，使用稀物质传递方法模拟药物扩散和传输，并将药物释放建模为具有时变速率常数的表观一级过程。
AI.result: 揭示了流动条件和多孔介质特性对药物释放曲线和通道内药物可用性的影响；发现在高雷诺数条件下，药物释放速率常数在后期阶段增加，同时植入物的运行时间延长。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明有可能开发出能够根据应用特定需求以更智能方式递送药物的DFPI设计。

title: Exact momentum-space analysis of small spin-1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$ rings
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures, to appear in Physics Letters A
summary: This paper considers an $N$-site spin-1/2 $J_1$-$J_2$ ring with $N=6$ and $8$. With the help of a set of exact few-magnon Bloch states, we obtain the block-diagonalized Hamiltonian consisting of block matrices of at most four dimensions. Partial of the eigenstates are analytically solved. For the six-site anisotropic ring, we reveal a subset of eigenstates that are simultaneous eigenstates of the Hamiltonian and the total angular momentum operator, even though the latter is not conserved. For both the six- and eight-site isotropic rings, we achieve momentum-space manifestations of several important states, including the famous Majumdar-Ghosh (MG) ground states and the Hamada-Kane-Nakagawa-Natsume (HKNN) ground state. The equivalence of these states with their real-space counterparts is explicitly shown for $N=6$. The structure of the HKNN ground state for small rings suggests that for any even number $N$ this state might behave like a ``bound state" with $N/2$ successive down spins binding together.

AI.tldr: 本文研究N=6和8的自旋1/2 J1-J2环，利用精确的少磁子布洛赫态实现哈密顿量的块对角化（最大维度4），解析求解部分本征态，揭示六位各向异性环中同时是哈密顿量和总角动量算符本征态的子集，展示各向同性环中MG基态和HKNN基态的动量空间形式，并推测HKNN基态可能表现为N/2个连续向下自旋束缚态。
AI.motivation: 理解和解析求解小尺寸自旋环中J1-J2模型的精确本征态结构，特别是探索总角动量不守恒下的对称性、基态（如Majumdar-Ghosh态和Hamada-Kane-Nakagawa-Natsume态）的动量空间表示以及其物理本质。
AI.method: 利用精确的少磁子布洛赫态集合，将哈密顿量块对角化为最多四维的块矩阵，从而解析求解部分本征态，并在动量空间中展示重要基态的结构。
AI.result: 六位各向异性环中存在同时是哈密顿量和总角动量算符本征态的子集；在六位和八位各向同性环中得到了MG基态和HKNN基态的动量空间形式，显式证明了N=6时与实空间态的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 对于任意偶数N，HKNN基态可能表现为类似N/2个连续向下自旋“束缚态”的结构。

title: Spin Seebeck Effect in Normal-Metal--Chiral-Insulator Heterostructure
summary: Phonons can carry angular momentum and exhibit chirality through the circular polarization of atomic motion. This enables a phonon-mediated spin Seebeck effect (SSE) via the conversion of phonon angular momentum into electron spin angular momentum. In this Letter, we develop a theoretical framework for calculating the spin current in a normal-metal (NM)-chiral-insulator (CI) heterostructure within the nonequilibrium Green's function formalism. We discuss the influence of (i) the thermal bias across the NM-CI interface, (ii) the chemical potential of the NM, and (iii) the insertion of an additional interfacial layer, on the spin transport properties. We identify two remarkable nonlinear spin transport phenomena: negative differential SSE and spin-current rectification. The negative differential SSE arises from the competition between the thermal bias and the thermally excited electron density. The spin-current rectification suggests the possibility of realizing a thermally controlled spin diode. We also find that the spin transport behavior is closely associated with an effective interfacial spectral density. This work provides a novel route toward thermally controlled spintronic devices using chiral phonons.

AI.tldr: 本文在非平衡格林函数框架下发展了手性绝缘体-金属异质结构中声子介导的自旋Seebeck效应的理论，发现了负微分自旋Seebeck效应和自旋电流整流现象，并提出了热控自旋二极管的可能性。
AI.motivation: 声子可携带角动量并通过原子运动的圆极化表现出手性，这有望实现声子介导的自旋Seebeck效应。然而，相关自旋输运的理论框架和机制尚不清晰，需要建立系统的理论模型。
AI.method: 基于非平衡格林函数形式，建立了正常金属-手性绝缘体异质结构中自旋电流的计算理论框架，分析了热偏压、金属化学势及界面插入层对自旋输运的影响。
AI.result: 发现了两种显著的非线性自旋输运现象：负微分自旋Seebeck效应（由热偏压与热激发电子密度竞争引起）和自旋电流整流效应。自旋输运行为与有效界面谱密度密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 该工作利用手性声子为实现热控自旋电子学器件（如热控自旋二极管）提供了新途径。

title: Thermodynamic Modeling of Pure Elements from 0 K with Uncertainty Quantification using PyCalphad and ESPEI
summary: Thermodynamic modeling of pure elements is the foundation of the CALPHAD modeling of engineering materials. Recently, multiple physics-based models have been proposed to describe Gibbs energy of pure elements down to 0 K, extending from 298.15 K in the current CALPHAD modeling. To enable their systematic and quantitative comparison and adoption, those thermodynamic models of pure elements are implemented into the open-source software packages PyCalphad and ESPEI in the present work for evaluation of model parameters and model fitness. PyCalphad and ESPEI are suitable tools for implementation of these models for high throughput CALPHAD modeling of multicomponent materials. Particularly, Markov Chain Monte Carlo used in ESPEI allows for uncertainty quantification of model parameters and model predictions. Through the remodeling of 41 pure elements, the present work demonstrates the quantitative comparison of modeling of pure elements with different models and enables the efficient development of multicomponent systems with continuously improved CALPHAD description of pure elements.

AI.tldr: 本文在开源软件PyCalphad和ESPEI中实现了多种基于物理的纯元素热力学模型（从0K到高温），通过对41种纯元素的重建模，实现了模型间的定量比较与不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 当前CALPHAD方法仅从298.15K开始描述纯元素Gibbs自由能，而新提出的物理模型可延伸至0K，但缺乏系统性的定量比较和统一实现框架，阻碍了这些模型在工程材料中的采纳。
AI.method: 在开源软件PyCalphad和ESPEI中实现多种基于物理的纯元素热力学模型；利用ESPEI中的马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛方法进行模型参数的不确定性量化；对41种纯元素进行系统性重建模和模型比较。
AI.result: 成功实现了多种纯元素热力学模型在开源软件中的集成；通过对41种纯元素的重建模，展示了不同模型间的定量比较结果；实现了模型参数和预测的不确定性量化。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为纯元素热力学模型的系统比较和采纳提供了统一框架，促进了多组元材料CALPHAD建模的高效发展，并支持持续改进纯元素CALPHAD描述。

title: Learning subgrid interfacial area in two-phase flows with regime-dependent inductive biases
summary: The reliability of machine learning in multiscale physical systems depends on how physical structure is embedded into the learning process. We investigate this in the context of turbulent multiphase flows, focusing on the prediction of subgrid interfacial area density, a key quantity governing interphase transport that remains unresolved in large-eddy simulations. In this work, we develop and evaluate two machine learning subgrid closure models to predict the three-dimensional subgrid interfacial area density: a purely data-driven 3D encoder-decoder network, and a physics-constrained variant regularized by a fractal geometric prior. Across a range of Weber numbers, the physics-based model improves predictive accuracy, reduces error variance, and suppresses nonphysical artifacts relative to purely data-driven approaches. We also show that these gains are regime-dependent: the embedded inductive bias enhances generalization in corrugation-dominated regimes where its underlying assumptions hold, but becomes ineffective in fragmentation-dominated regimes characterized by topology change and droplet breakup. These results reveal a broader principle for scientific machine learning: the utility of physics-informed models depends not only on the presence of inductive bias, but on its alignment with the governing physical regime. This suggests a path toward regime-aware learning frameworks for modeling of complex multiscale systems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对湍流多相流中的亚网格界面面积密度预测问题，开发了纯数据驱动和物理约束（分形几何先验）两种机器学习闭合模型。研究发现，物理约束模型在特定流动 regime 下提升精度、减少伪影，但在拓扑变化剧烈的 fragmentation 主导 regime 中效果有限，揭示了物理信息模型的有效性取决于归纳偏置与物理 regime 的对齐程度。
AI.motivation: 湍流多相流的大涡模拟中，亚网格界面面积密度（控制相间传输的关键量）无法直接解析，传统数据驱动方法缺乏物理结构约束，导致预测精度不足和非物理伪影。作者希望探索如何通过嵌入物理结构提升机器学习模型的可靠性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 开发两种3D亚网格闭合模型：(1) 纯数据驱动的3D编码器-解码器网络；(2) 物理约束变体，引入分形几何先验作为正则化项。在多个Weber数下评估两种模型性能，并分析不同流动 regime（corrugation主导 vs. fragmentation主导）下的表现差异。
AI.result: 物理约束模型在整体上提升了预测精度，降低了误差方差，并抑制了非物理伪影。但这种增益具有regime依赖性：在褶皱主导（corrugation-dominated） regime中效果显著（归纳偏置假设成立），在碎片化主导（fragmentation-dominated） regime中效果不佳（拓扑变化和液滴破碎导致先验失效）。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息机器学习模型的有效性不仅取决于是否嵌入了归纳偏置，更取决于该偏置是否与具体物理 regime 对齐。这为复杂多尺度系统建模提出了"regime-aware"学习框架的发展方向。

title: Dynamical Fluctuation-Response Relations
summary: We derive exact dynamical fluctuation-response relations (FRRs) for time-integrated observables of any nonautonomous Markov jump process. The finite-time covariance splits into an initial variability and an integral of response kernels along the driven dynamics. The identity sharpens the dynamical response thermodynamic and kinetic uncertainty relations and fluctuation-response inequalities (FRIs). It also recovers steady-state FRRs, fluctuation-dissipation theorem and Onsager reciprocity, identifies known autonomous FRIs as the zero-frequency mode.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了非自治马尔可夫跳变过程中时间积分观测量的精确动态涨落-响应关系(FRRs)，将有限时间协方差分解为初始变异性和沿驱动动力学的响应核积分。
AI.motivation: 建立非自治马尔可夫跳变过程中时间积分观测量的精确动态涨落-响应关系(FRRs)。
AI.method: 推导了有限时间协方差分解为初始变异性和驱动响应核积分的精确FRR公式。
AI.result: 该恒等式强化了动态响应热力学和动力学不确定性关系以及涨落-响应不等式(FRIs)；恢复稳态FRRs、涨落-耗散定理和Onsager互易关系；将已知自治FRI识别为零频率模式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为非平衡系统的时间积分可观测量提供了统一的精确涨落-响应理论框架，并弥合了动态与稳态响应理论之间的差距。

title: Record magnetoresistance, enhanced superconductivity, and fermiology in WTe2
comment: 12 pages including 3 figures, plus 13 of supplementary information
summary: The diverse electronic properties of transition metal chalcogenides can be very sensitive to crystal imperfections. A new crystal growth technique, known as horizontal flux transport, offers a route to improved crystal quality. By refining this technique and applying it to the topological semimetal WTe2, we achieved crystals with an order of magnitude less disorder as determined by electrical transport and scanning tunneling microscopy measurements. At low temperatures these crystals exhibit the largest magnetoresistance reported in a metal. Exfoliated monolayers show quantum oscillations for the first time in the electrostatically doped metallic states, enabling determination of band degeneracies and the valley splitting induced by an electric field. Moreover, they exhibit a gated superconducting dome with a greatly enhanced critical temperature approaching 1.8 K. This advance opens up new avenues for employing WTe2 in topological electronics and gated superconducting devices, and promises comparable breakthroughs with other chalcogenides.

AI.tldr: 通过改进水平通量传输晶体生长技术，获得了更高纯度的WTe2拓扑半金属晶体，实现了创纪录的低温水电阻、单层中首次观察到量子振荡和谷劈裂，以及接近1.8K的门控超导穹顶。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属硫族化合物的电子性质对晶体缺陷非常敏感，而现有晶体质量限制了对其本征物性的研究和应用，因此需要开发更好的生长方法以获得高质量晶体。
AI.method: 改进并应用水平通量传输（horizontal flux transport）晶体生长技术来制备WTe2晶体。
AI.result: 1) 晶体无序程度降低一个数量级；2) 低温下展现出金属中最大的磁电阻；3) 剥离的单层中首次在静电掺杂金属态中观察到量子振荡，确定了能带简并度和电场诱导的谷劈裂；4) 实现了门控超导穹顶，临界温度接近1.8 K。
AI.conclusion: 该进展为WTe2在拓扑电子学和门控超导器件中的应用开辟了新途径，并有望在其它硫族化合物中实现类似的突破。

title: Broadband impulsive stimulated Raman spectroscopy reveals electronic state-specific vibronic coupling and vibrational coherence transfer through nonadiabatic electronic coupling
summary: Vibrational wavepacket dynamics in the ground (X) and excited (B) electronic states of iodine under impulsive-pump/broadband-probe excitation are revisited. A method for accurate chirp correction, necessary to determine the zero time for each component of spectrally dispersed data and thereby separate coherent vibrational dynamics from coherent artifacts and population kinetics, is introduced. While from these processed time-domain data the absolute Raman cross-section in the ground electronic state can be calculated using steady-state absorption, we show that the same can be done using the pump-probe data itself, and further extend this method as a benchmark to calculate the same for the excited electronic state; these cross-sections report on vibronic couplings specific to these states. Further, since the Fourier transform of the processed data yields information on vibrational modes averaged over the dephasing time, a wavelet analysis is performed to yield a joint time-frequency distribution of the vibrational modes, demonstrating how the time evolution of their frequencies can be extracted. The vibrational modes of the ground and excited electronic states are shown to exhibit distinct dispersion characteristics. Since overlapping spectral features appear at different time windows, such an analysis can disentangle spectral congestion, even from a simple one-dimensional measurement. Most interestingly, a rapid time-dependent spectral shift and decay of the B state mode, followed by the appearance and growth of the A-state mode, directly correlates with the pre-dissociation, followed by solvent caging-induced recombination. Thus, the present work reveals transfer of vibrational coherence from one electronic state (B) to another (A), mediated via nonadiabatic coupling to the intermediate dissociative state (a), underscoring the importance of electronic coherence.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了碘分子在基态(X)和激发态(B)中的振动波包动力学，提出了一种精确的啁啾校正方法，并展示了如何从泵浦-探测数据中计算基态和激发态的绝对拉曼截面。通过小波分析提取振动模式的时频分布，揭示了B态到A态的振动相干性转移，该过程由非绝热耦合介导的预解离和溶剂笼效应复合驱动。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理泵浦-探测光谱数据时，啁啾效应会干扰零时间的确定，从而混淆相干振动动力学与相干伪影及布居动力学。此外，激发态绝对拉曼截面的计算缺乏基准方法，而振动模式的时间演化信息（如频散特性）也难以从传统傅里叶变换中充分提取。
AI.method: 1) 提出啁啾校正方法，确定光谱色散数据各分量的零时间；2) 利用泵浦-探测数据自身计算基态绝对拉曼截面，并扩展至激发态；3) 采用小波分析替代傅里叶变换，获得振动模式的联合时频分布；4) 通过时频分析追踪B态和A态振动模式的频散特征及时间演变。
AI.result: 基态和激发态的振动模式表现出不同的频散特性。B态模式出现快速的时频谱移和衰减，随后A态模式出现并增长，这直接关联于预解离过程及后续的溶剂笼效应诱导复合。成功观测到振动相干性从B态经非绝热耦合通过中间解离态(a)转移到A态。
AI.conclusion: 小波时频分析能从简单的一维测量中解缠光谱重叠，即使在不同时间窗口内光谱特征重叠也能有效区分。更重要的是，研究揭示了电子态间振动相干性转移现象，强调了电子相干性在非绝热动力学中的关键作用。

title: Grassmann time-evolving matrix product operators for fermionic impurities coupled to a superconducting bath
summary: The Grassmann time-evolving matrix product operator (GTEMPO) method, which represents the Feynman-Vernon influence functional as a temporal matrix product state, has been shown to be a flexible and potentially scalable solution for fermionic quantum impurity problems. In this work, we extend GTEMPO to solve fermionic impurity problems in the Nambu formalism, in which the impurity is coupled to a superconducting bath. A key insight is that by employing the Bogoliubov transformation for the superconducting bath, one could obtain the analytic expression of the Feynman-Vernon influence functional in a similar form to the case of a normal bath, after which the core algorithms of GTEMPO can be straightforwardly adapted. We demonstrate the accuracy of our method by benchmarking it against exact diagonalization in several exactly solvable cases, and against the continuous-time quantum Monte Carlo method using converged dynamical mean field theory (DMFT) iterations on the imaginary contour in the non-integrable case. In all cases, we perform both imaginary- and real-time calculations to illustrate the flexibility of our method. These results illustrate that our method could be potentially useful as an impurity solver in DMFT as well as its non-equilibrium extension for fermionic impurity problems in the Nambu formalism.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展GTEMPO方法至Nambu形式，通过Bogoliubov变换处理超导浴，实现了对超导耦合费米子杂质问题的求解，并在DMFT中展示了潜力。
AI.motivation: 将GTEMPO方法从正常浴扩展到超导浴（Nambu形式），以解决更广泛的费米子杂质问题。
AI.method: 利用Bogoliubov变换对超导浴进行处理，获得与正常浴类似的Feynman-Vernon影响泛函解析形式，从而适配GTEMPO的核心算法。
AI.result: 通过与精确对角化（可积情况）和连续时间量子蒙特卡洛（非可积DMFT迭代）的对比，验证了方法在虚时和实时计算中的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为DMFT及其非平衡扩展的杂质求解器，在Nambu形式下具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Analytical Treatment of Noise-Suppressed Klein Tunneling in Graphene with Possible Implications for Quantum-Dot Qubits
summary: We study quantum tunneling through a potential barrier whose height fluctuates in time and is modeled by Gaussian white noise. We map the stochastic dynamics onto an equivalent time-independent Lindblad equation for the density matrix, allowing fully analytical solutions. For Schrödinger particles, noise introduces dissipation that suppresses Fabry-Pérot oscillations and yields an exponentially decaying transmission. Applying the same formalism to graphene, we demonstrate that noise induces a complex longitudinal wavevector within the barrier, leading to a strong suppression of transmission and Klein tunneling, even at normal incidence. Our approach promises improved control over Klein tunneling. These results demonstrate that noisy barriers can act as tunable dissipative elements, offering a pathway to enhanced control of electron transport in graphene-based devices. We also briefly discuss how our results could guide the design of graphene quantum dots for potential use in spin qubit devices.

AI.tldr: 研究时间波动势垒（高斯白噪声）下的量子隧穿，通过映射到含时Lindblad方程解析求解。发现噪声导致耗散，抑制法布里-珀罗振荡并产生指数衰减透射。在石墨烯中，噪声诱导复数纵向波矢，强烈抑制透射和Klein隧穿（包括正入射），为可调谐耗散元件和石墨烯量子点设计提供新途径。
AI.motivation: 研究高度随时间波动的势垒（高斯白噪声）对量子隧穿的影响，并探索噪声作为可控耗散手段在石墨烯器件（特别是Klein隧穿调控和量子点设计）中的应用。
AI.method: 将含噪声的随机动力学映射为等价的含时无关Lindblad主方程，从而对密度矩阵进行完全解析求解。分别对薛定谔粒子和石墨烯中的狄拉克费米子进行分析。
AI.result: 噪声引入耗散，抑制法布里-珀罗振荡，透射呈指数衰减。在石墨烯中，噪声导致势垒内出现复数纵向波矢，显著抑制透射和Klein隧穿（包括正入射）。
AI.conclusion: 噪声势垒可作为可调谐耗散元件，为石墨烯器件中的电子输运控制提供新途径，并对石墨烯量子点（如自旋量子比特）的设计有指导意义。

title: Large language model-enabled automated data extraction for concrete materials informatics
summary: The promise of data-driven materials discovery remains constrained by the scarcity of large, high-quality, and accessible experimental datasets. Here, we introduce a generalizable large language model (LLM)-powered pipeline for automated extraction and structuring of materials data from unstructured scientific literature, using concrete materials as a representative and particularly challenging example. The pipeline exhibits robust performance across a broad range of LLMs and achieves an $F_1$ score of up to 0.97 for diverse composition--process--property attributes. Within one hour, it extracts nearly 9,000 high-quality records with over 100 attributes screened from more than 27,000 publications, enabling the construction of the largest open laboratory database for blended cement concrete. Machine learning analyses underscore the importance of large, diverse, and information-rich datasets for enhancing both in-distribution accuracy and out-of-distribution generalization to unseen materials. The proposed pipeline is readily adaptable to other materials domains and accelerates the development of scalable data infrastructures for materials informatics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型(LLM)的自动化管线，可从非结构化科学文献中提取材料数据，在混凝土领域实现高精度（F1最高0.97），一小时内从27000多篇论文中提取近9000条高质量记录，构建了最大的混凝土开放实验室数据库，并证明大规模多样化数据对材料信息学的重要性。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动材料发现受限于缺乏大规模、高质量、可访问的实验数据集，需要自动化从科学文献中提取结构化数据的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于大语言模型(LLM)的通用管线，可从非结构化科学文献中自动提取和结构化材料数据，以混凝土为代表性案例进行验证。
AI.result: 管线在多种LLM上均表现稳健，F1分数最高达0.97；一小时内从27000多篇论文中提取近9000条高质量记录、涵盖100多个属性，构建了最大的混凝土开放实验室数据库；机器学习分析表明大规模、多样化、信息丰富的数据集可提升分布内精度和分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该管线易于推广到其他材料领域，加速材料信息学可扩展数据基础设施的发展。

title: An axion framework for Particle-in-Cell codes with Monte-Carlo sampling: emission, absorption, and detailed balance in plasmas
summary: We present an extension of the OSIRIS particle-in-cell (PIC) code that introduces an axion macroparticle species and three axion-production channels commonly used in thermal-plasma axion phenomenology: screened Primakoff conversion $(γ+ Z \leftrightarrow a + Z)$, Compton-like photoproduction on electrons in a blackbody photon bath $(γ+ e \to a + e)$, and thermal axion bremsstrahlung from electron-ion and electron-electron scattering $(e + Z \to e + Z + a$ and $e + e \to e + e + a)$. The package is integrated into the existing OSIRIS quantum-electrodynamics (QED) Monte Carlo infrastructure and provides Poisson macro-event sampling with unbiased weight rescaling for variance control. Optional modules implement conservative cell-local energy and momentum feedback and temperature-field evolution, and each channel includes an inverse absorption operator constructed to satisfy detailed balance with a thermal bath. We benchmark forward spectral emissivities for uniform plasmas at $T_e = 1.3~\mathrm{keV}$, $3~\mathrm{keV}$, and $5~\mathrm{keV}$ against screened analytic results based on Raffelt-style calculations, finding percent-level agreement in integrated power for all channels and good reproduction of spectral peak positions. In addition, homogeneous relaxation tests with forward and inverse operators enabled show that, for all three implemented channels, the axion population and total axion energy evolve toward stable steady-state values, providing an initial validation of detailed-balance recovery in the inverse-process implementation. These results establish a foundation for kinetic simulations of axion production, absorption, and transport in high-energy-density plasmas, while more extensive validation of feedback physics and fully dynamic multidimensional coupled scenarios remains future work.

AI.tldr: 本文在OSIRIS PIC代码中扩展了轴子宏粒子模块，实现了三种热等离子体轴子产生通道（屏蔽Primakoff、Compton光产生和轫致辐射），通过蒙特卡洛采样和详细平衡逆过程算子进行模拟。在均匀等离子体中对发射谱的基准测试显示与解析结果高度一致（~%级精度），松弛测试验证了详细平衡恢复，为高能密度等离子体中轴子动力学模拟奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 将轴子宏观粒子种类及其产生/吸收过程集成到现有的PIC框架中，以支持高能密度等离子体中轴子产生、吸收和输运的全动力学模拟。
AI.method: 在OSIRIS PIC代码中扩展轴子宏粒子种类，利用现有QED蒙特卡洛基础设施实现三种轴子产生通道的Poisson宏事件采样，采用无偏权重重缩放控制方差，并实现了满足详细平衡的逆吸收算子和可选的局域能量/动量反馈与温度场演化模块。
AI.result: 在Te=1.3、3、5 keV均匀等离子体中，正向发射谱与Raffelt解析结果在积分功率上达到百分比级一致，谱峰位置吻合良好；同质松弛测试中，三个通道的轴子布居和总能量均演化至稳态，验证了详细平衡恢复。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为高能密度等离子体中轴子产生、吸收和输运的动力学模拟建立了基础，但反馈物理和全动态多维耦合场景的进一步验证留待未来研究。

title: Conformal Invariance of the large-$N$ limit of the $O(N)$ universality class
summary: Conformal symmetry is expected to be realized in many equilibrium statistical mechanical systems at criticality. Although this is certainly true in two-dimensional systems, the three-dimensional case is subtler, and only a few proofs exist, only so in very specific cases. In this work, we give two proofs for the large $N$ limit of the $O(N)$ universality class within the non-perturbative renormalization group framework: one functional, and one vertex-by-vertex in Fourier space. While doing so, we unveil how the theory is structured in order for conformal symmetry to be realized. As a consequence, we shed light on what to expect, on rather general grounds, for a theory to be conformally invariant.

AI.tldr: 本文在非微扰重整化群框架下，给出了O(N)普适类在大N极限下具有共形对称性的两种证明（泛函方法和傅里叶空间逐顶点方法），揭示了理论实现共形对称性的结构条件，为一般理论的共形不变性提供了普遍性见解。
AI.motivation: 三维临界统计力学系统中共形对称性是否成立是一个微妙的问题，仅有少数特定情况下的证明。作者希望在大N极限下严格证明O(N)普适类的共形不变性，并揭示其内在结构机制。
AI.method: 采用非微扰重整化群框架，给出了两种证明：（1）泛函方法；（2）傅里叶空间逐顶点方法。通过分析理论的结构来展示共形对称性如何实现。
AI.result: 成功在大N极限下证明了O(N)普适类的共形对称性，并阐明了理论实现共形不变性所需的结构条件。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了共形对称性在三维临界系统中的实现机制，为一般性理论是否具有共形不变性提供了判断依据，推动了三维共形场论的理解。

title: Unconventional mixed state in the nematic superconductor LiFeAs
summary: In the mixed state of type-II bulk superconductors, the magnetic field penetrates in the form of vortices enclosing one magnetic flux quantum: this is the conventional Abrikosov vortex lattice. Here, by using transverse muon-spin spectroscopy, we demonstrate the presence of an unconventional vortex lattice in LiFeAs single crystals. We also show evidence that the new mixed phase consists of stripes of "coreless" vortices, which are bound states of two spatially separated half-quantum vortices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过横向μ子自旋谱学发现LiFeAs单晶中存在非常规涡旋晶格，其混合相由"无芯"涡旋条带组成——这些涡旋是空间分离的半量子涡旋对的束缚态，而非传统Abrikosov涡旋晶格。
AI.motivation: 传统二类超导体在混合态中形成Abrikosov涡旋晶格（每个涡旋携带一个磁通量子），本文旨在探索是否存在偏离该常规图像的非常规涡旋态。
AI.method: 采用横向μ子自旋谱学（transverse muon-spin spectroscopy）技术，对LiFeAs单晶进行实验测量。
AI.result: 在LiFeAs单晶中观察到非常规涡旋晶格的存在，并发现混合相由"无芯"涡旋条带构成，这些涡旋本质上是两个空间分离的半量子涡旋形成的束缚态。
AI.conclusion: LiFeAs中存在的是一种全新的混合态结构——半量子涡旋对的束缚态组成的"无芯"涡旋条带，这挑战了传统Abrikosov涡旋晶格的图像，为理解非常规超导体中的涡旋物理提供了新视角。

title: Electronic Final States in Nuclear $β$ Decay: A Sudden-Approximation Framework
summary: Electronic final states generated by sudden changes of the Hamiltonian are studied here, with emphasis on nuclear charge variation in $β$ decay. A $λ$-parametrized family $\hat H(λ)$ that continuously connects the initial and final Hamiltonians, so that the electronic response can be represented as a continuous deformation in Hilbert space, is introduced. Within the sudden approximation, transition amplitudes are written as overlaps between eigenstates of distinct Hamiltonians. To relate non-orthogonal one-electron basis sets in a stable way, the paper uses a practical transport scheme based on overlap metrics and truncated singular value decomposition (SVD). This mapping is interpreted as a discrete counterpart of continuous transport along the $λ$ path. The formalism is first developed for the one-electron case, where analytic structure and selection rules are made explicit, and then generalized to many-electron systems via nonorthogonal determinant overlap expressions. The resulting formulation gives transition probabilities in bound and continuum channels in a way that is both numerically stable and easy to interpret.

AI.tldr: 本文针对β衰变中哈密顿量突变导致的电子响应问题，提出一种基于λ参数化连续变形和奇异值分解的非正交基映射方案，实现了稳定且可解释的跃迁概率计算。
AI.motivation: 解决β衰变等过程中电子哈密顿量突然变化时，非正交基集下跃迁振幅计算的不稳定性与难解释性问题。
AI.method: 引入λ参数化哈密顿族$\hat H(λ)$连接初末态；利用重叠度量和截断奇异值分解(SVD)实现非正交基的稳定映射，将其解释为离散化的连续输运；从单电子推广到多电子体系。
AI.result: 给出了单电子情形的解析结构和选择定则，推广到多电子后得到数值稳定且易于解释的束缚态和连续道跃迁概率表达式。
AI.conclusion: 该 formalism 为β衰变等突变过程中的电子跃迁提供了稳定、可解释的计算框架。

title: Coherent spin waves in a maximal entropy phase
summary: In solids, disorder is conventionally regarded as detrimental to coherence. It typically localizes and dampens collective excitations, as exemplified by Anderson localization or the broadening of magnetic modes in systems lacking long-range order. While high-entropy materials are specifically designed to harness disorder and stabilize homogeneous mixed-phase structures that can display unique properties, this same disorder is nonetheless expected to preclude the formation of coherent magnetic excitations. To test the limits of this picture, we selected the antiferromagnetic system YBaCuFeO5, as it features two distinct transition metal atoms with significantly different magnetic moments, rendering its spin dynamics exceptionally sensitive to local atomic ordering. Combining resonant inelastic x-ray scattering and linear spin wave theory, we reveal a surprising paradox: YBaCuFeO5 exhibits an unexpected, entropy-driven mixed phase, in which disorder, rather than reducing the lifetime of the collective excitations, favors coherence. In this mixed phase, the spin waves remain dispersive, markedly distinct from those expected for an ordered ground state, and exhibit well-defined acoustic and optical branches separated by a large optical gap. These results demonstrate that in entropy-stabilized magnets, disorder can favor coherent collective modes previously thought to be exclusive to low-entropy systems.

AI.tldr: 在YBaCuFeO5反铁磁体系中，发现熵驱动的混合相中无序反而增强了自旋波相干性，形成了清晰的声学和光学支，挑战了传统认知中无序必然破坏集体激发相干性的观点。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为无序会局域化和阻尼集体激发（如安德森局域化），而高熵材料虽利用无序获得独特性质，但通常被认为无法形成相干磁激发。本文旨在检验这一认知的极限。
AI.method: 选择YBaCuFeO5反铁磁体系（两种不同磁矩的过渡金属原子），结合共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）和线性自旋波理论进行分析。
AI.result: 发现熵驱动的混合相中，无序非但没有缩短集体激发的寿命，反而促进了相干性：自旋波保持色散性，具有清晰的声学和光学支，且存在较大的光学能隙。
AI.conclusion: 在熵稳定的磁性材料中，无序可以有利于此前被认为只存在于低熵体系中的相干集体模式。

title: Noise spectroscopy of insulating and itinerant altermagnets
summary: One of the central goals in the emergent field of altermagnetism is the unambiguous experimental identification and characterization of altermagnetic order across a variety of compounds. This motivates exploring tools that can clearly distinguish altermagnets from antiferromagnets, based on symmetry signatures, and offer access to the dominant orbital character (e.g., $d$-wave vs. $g$-wave) of the magnetic order parameter. In this work, we theoretically explore the potential of noise magnetometry for this task, studying contributions from both magnons and itinerant electrons in different regimes and scenarios. While altermagnetism and antiferromagnetism also lead to different noise spectra for magnons, we find the most striking and symmetry-sensitive signatures in the charge fluctuations of itinerant altermagnets. Both for the homogeneous bulk case and in the presence of strain and/or around domain walls, we identify noise contributions that are only permitted by symmetry in the altermagnet and, thus, provide a unique signature of altermagnetism. Furthermore, the angular dependence of noise around domain walls also offers access to the orbital character of the altermagnet. On a more technical note, we discuss the role and relevance of lattice effects related to the dipole tensor. We hope that our work will help pave the way towards the clear experimental identification of altermagnetism across a wide range of candidate materials.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上探讨了利用噪声磁力测量技术来区分交变磁体与反铁磁体，并识别其轨道特征（d波或g波）。研究发现，在巡游交变磁体的电荷涨落中存在仅由对称性允许的独特噪声信号，且围绕畴壁的噪声角分布可揭示其轨道特性。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体是新兴的磁性相，亟需明确的实验识别方法将其与反铁磁体区分开来，并表征其磁有序参数的轨道特征（d波 vs g波）。
AI.method: 从理论上分析了噪声磁力测量技术，研究了磁振子和巡游电子在不同场景下（均匀体材料、存在应变及畴壁周围）的噪声谱贡献，特别关注了对称性允许的电荷涨落信号。
AI.result: 交变磁体与反铁磁体在磁振子噪声谱上存在差异，但最具对称性辨识度的特征出现在巡游交变磁体的电荷涨落中。在均匀体、应变及畴壁附近均发现了仅由交变磁体对称性允许的噪声贡献。畴壁周围噪声的角分布还可揭示轨道特征。
AI.conclusion: 噪声磁力测量有望成为清晰实验识别交变磁体的有力工具，能够区分交变磁体与反铁磁体并表征其轨道特性。

title: Chirality Transfer to the Centrosymmetric Magnetic Sublattice in the Hybrid Perovskite (R)-/(S)-3-Fluoropyrrolidinium Copper(II) Chloride
comment: 24 pages, 7 main figures, 8 supplementary figures. Crystallographic data can be obtained from via the joint Cambridge Crystallographic Data Centre (CCDC) and Fachinformationszentrum Karlsruhe Access Structures service at https://ccdc.cam.ac.uk/structures under Deposition Numbers 2543946-2543948
summary: Incorporating chiral organic cations into organic-inorganic hybrid materials has been shown to enable the inorganic sublattice to display chiroptical properties. We report a new two-dimensional magnetic (S=1/2) chiral metal halide material, (R)- and (S)-$(C_4H_9FN)_2CuCl_4$ (where $(C_4H_9FN)^+$ is 3-fluoropyrrolidinium), which consists of Cu-Cl inorganic layers separated by $(C_4H_9FN)^+$ organic cations. The presence of the chiral $(C_4H_9FN)^+$ organic cation induces formation of chiral magnetic order, even though the inorganic sublattice itself is structurally centrosymmetric. We also report the racemic variant, containing an equal amount of (R)- and (S)- cations, which shows no evidence of chiral magnetic order. When the magnetic susceptibility is measured perpendicular to inorganic Cu-Cl layer propagation direction, an antiferromagnetic phase transition at Néel temperature $T_N = 2.23~K$ is observed in both the chiral and racemic materials, and the existence of the magnetic phase transition is supported by specific heat capacity measurements. Field-induced magnetic chirality is observed through the existence of a second-order magnetoelectric effect in the chiral variant, while no magnetoelectric signal is observed for the racemic material, indicating the absence of magnetic chirality. Our findings demonstrate that materials exhibiting chiral magnetic order can be created through the incorporation of a chiral cation into an organic-inorganic hybrid magnetic material, potentially allowing for the design of tailored materials that combine chiral magnetism with other desirable optical and electronic properties that come from structural chirality.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种新型二维手性金属卤化物材料(R)/(S)-$(C_4H_9FN)_2CuCl_4$，通过引入手性有机阳离子诱导非中心对称的无机亚晶格产生手性磁有序，并观察到反铁磁相变和场诱导的磁手性效应（二阶磁电效应），而外消旋体则无此现象。
AI.motivation: 探索通过手性有机阳离子诱导有机-无机杂化材料中无机亚晶格产生手性磁有序的可能性，为设计兼具手性磁性与光学、电学性质的材料提供新思路。
AI.method: 合成(R)-和(S)-$(C_4H_9FN)_2CuCl_4$手性材料及其外消旋对应物；通过磁化率测量（垂直层方向）和比热容测量表征磁相变；通过二阶磁电效应测量检测场诱导的磁手性。
AI.result: 手性和外消旋材料均在$T_N=2.23~K$处观察到反铁磁相变；仅手性变体表现出二阶磁电效应（即场诱导磁手性），外消旋材料无此信号。
AI.conclusion: 证明通过在手性有机-无机杂化磁性材料中引入手性阳离子，可成功创造具有手性磁有序的材料，为设计兼具手性磁性与光学、电子特性的定制材料提供了可能。

title: Microstructure engineering of Ti-6Al-4V in laser powder bed fusion via 1D thermal modeling and supporting experiments
summary: The microstructure of Ti-6Al-4V has a decisive impact on its mechanical performance; however, controlling phase composition during Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) remains difficult because of the inherent localized and cyclic thermal history. To fully leverage the design flexibility of LPBF while maintaining an efficient process, it is desirable to tailor the microstructure directly through process-parameter optimization rather than relying on post-processing or in-situ heat treatments. Nevertheless, the large and multidimensional parameter space, combined with the limited availability of experimental data, makes this task particularly challenging. In this work, we develop an efficient computational framework that links process conditions to microstructure evolution by coupling a phase transformation model with a fast 1D finite-difference thermal model, enabling comprehensive insights into process-microstructure relations. The framework predicts the fractions of stable $α_s$, martensitic $α_m$, and $β$ phases and is validated experimentally. A broad design of experiments covering 2,000 parameter combinations (spanning volumetric energy density, layer thickness, interlayer time, and build plate temperature) demonstrates how these parameters influence phase evolution and provides systematic practical guidelines for process design. The framework reproduces experimental trends with sufficient accuracy while being orders of magnitude faster than high-fidelity simulations, enabling rapid exploration of process-structure relationships in LPBF of Ti-6Al-4V.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个结合相变模型与一维有限差分热模型的快速计算框架，用于预测LPBF成形Ti-6Al-4V的相组成（α_s、α_m、β），并通过2000组参数组合的实验验证，实现了工艺-微观结构关系的快速探索。
AI.motivation: LPBF成形Ti-6Al-4V时，微观结构对力学性能至关重要，但相组成控制困难。现有方法依赖后处理或原位热处理，效率低下。亟需一种通过工艺参数直接优化微观结构的高效方法。
AI.method: 将相变模型与快速一维有限差分热模型耦合，构建工艺条件到微观结构演变的计算框架；通过2000组参数组合（涵盖体能量密度、层厚、层间时间、基板温度）进行设计实验，预测α_s、α_m、β三相分数，并用实验验证。
AI.result: 该框架能以足够精度复现实验趋势，计算速度比高保真仿真快数个数量级，系统揭示了工艺参数对相演变的影响规律，提供了实用的工艺设计指导。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种高效的计算框架，可在少量实验数据下快速探索LPBF Ti-6Al-4V的工艺-结构关系，为通过工艺参数优化直接调控微观组织提供了可行方案。

title: On the geometric algebras of the Ising model
summary: We revisit the classical transfer matrix solution of the one- and two-dimensional Ising model from the perspective of Clifford and conformal geometric algebras. Building on Kaufman's spinor formulation, we show that all elements entering the solution, including the transfer matrix, its eigenvectors, and the quasiparticle excitations, admit a natural and unified interpretation as elements of an appropriate conformal Clifford algebra. In particular, the transfer matrix can be viewed as a dilation generated by a conformal bivector, while its eigenvectors correspond to null combinations of Clifford generators, closely paralleling the emergence of Majorana fermionic degrees of freedom. In the two-dimensional case, the standard eigenvalue equation for the row-to-row transfer matrix is reinterpreted as a dispersion relation for quasiparticle excitations, exposing the connection between the Ising model and a theory of free Majorana fermions. While all the explicit exact results recovered are well known, this geometric reformulation provides a unified algebraic framework which is compact and physically interpretable. Specifically, this clarifies the role of scale transformations, fermionic modes, and duality in the Ising model. We believe this approach offers a useful pedagogical complement to more conventional fermionic, Grassmann, or field theoretic treatments.

AI.tldr: 本文从克利福德几何代数和共形几何代数的视角重新审视一维和二维Ising模型的经典转移矩阵解法，发现转移矩阵、本征向量和准粒子激发等元素均可自然地统一为共形克利福德代数中的元素，从而提供一个紧凑且物理可解释的代数框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管Ising模型的精确解早已为人熟知，但其传统推导中涉及的Grassmann代数、费米子化等方法在代数结构上不够统一直观。本文旨在通过共形克利福德代数重新表述，揭示转移矩阵、本征向量和准粒子的几何本质，提供一个更紧凑、物理可解释的代数框架，并作为教学上的有益补充。
AI.method: 基于Kaufman的自旋子表述，将转移矩阵视为共形双向量生成的伸缩变换，将本征向量解释为克利福德生成元的零组合（类比Majorana费米子自由度）。在二维情形下，将行到行转移矩阵的标准本征值方程重新诠释为准粒子激发的色散关系，从而建立Ising模型与自由Majorana费米子理论之间的代数对应。
AI.result: 所有已知的精确解结果均被重新获得，但通过共形克利福德代数框架得到了统一的几何诠释。该框架清晰地揭示了Ising模型中尺度变换、费米子模式和对偶性的代数角色。
AI.conclusion: 该几何重构方法提供了一个紧凑、统一且物理上可解释的代数框架，可作为传统费米子化、Grassmann代数或场论处理方法的有效教学补充。

title: Campbell penetration depth in a single crystal of heavy fermion superconductor CeCoIn$_5$
summary: The temperature and magnetic field dependent magnetic penetration depth, $λ_m(T,H)$, was measured in a single crystal of a heavy fermion superconductor CeCoIn$_5$ using a frequency-domain tunnel diode resonator. In addition to the London penetration depth, which yields the superfluid density, measurements in a finite DC magnetic field provide Campbell penetration depth, $λ_C(T,H)$, which is directly linked to the true (unrelaxed) critical current density, $J_c$. The measured $λ_C(H)$ in CeCoIn$_5$ deviates significantly from the conventional $\sim \sqrt{H}$ behavior, and its slope changes abruptly at the characteristic magnetic field values. Considering that our sample is in the clean limit, we interpret this deviation as a fingerprint of the vortex lattice symmetry change. The temperature dependence $J_c(T)$ of CeCoIn$_5$ calculated from $λ_C(T)$ is nearly $T$-linear over the entire temperature range, also in stark contrast to expectations in a conventional type-II superconductor. Our results provide new evidence for unconventional superconductivity in CeCoIn$_5$ from the never-before-measured Campbell penetration depth.

AI.tldr: 本文通过测量重费米子超导体CeCoIn$_5$单晶的Campbell穿透深度$λ_C(T,H)$，发现其磁场依赖关系显著偏离传统$\sim \sqrt{H}$行为，且温度依赖的临界电流密度$J_c(T)$呈近线性关系，揭示了非常规超导电性的新证据。
AI.motivation: 传统超导理论无法解释CeCoIn$_5$中观察到的非常规超导行为，缺乏对涡旋晶格对称性变化及真实临界电流密度的直接实验测量。
AI.method: 使用频域隧道二极管谐振器测量CeCoIn$_5$单晶的磁穿透深度$λ_m(T,H)$，结合伦敦穿透深度和Campbell穿透深度$λ_C(T,H)$，推导出未弛豫的临界电流密度$J_c$。
AI.result: 实验发现：1) $λ_C(H)$显著偏离传统$\sim \sqrt{H}$依赖，在特征磁场值处斜率突变；2) $J_c(T)$在整个温度范围内呈近线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 这些异常行为表明CeCoIn$_5$中涡旋晶格对称性发生改变，为其非常规超导电性提供了来自Campbell穿透深度测量的新证据。

title: A Machine-Learned Symbolic Committor for a Chemical Reaction: Retinal Isomerization
summary: The thermal cis-trans isomerization around the C$_{13}$=C$_{14}$ double bond of retinal is a prototypical high-barrier reaction whose mechanism hinges on subtle out-of-plane bending motions. We apply Artificial Intelligence for Molecular Mechanism Discovery (AIMMD) to N-retinylidene-lysine in vacuum, learning the committor from unbiased molecular dynamics trajectories generated by two-way shooting. Parametrizing the logit of the committor, rather than the committor itself, allows the neural network to resolve the reaction coordinate across the full transition region, not only at the isocommittor surface $p_B(\mathbf{x}) = 0.5$. Holdback input randomization identifies four proper dihedrals around the reactive bond as the informative coordinates, while the improper dihedrals at C$_{13}$ and C$_{14}$ prove unsuitable because reactant, transition, and product states share the same values. Symbolic regression then distills the network into compact analytical expressions and shows that a nonlinear coupling of all four dihedrals is required to reproduce the S-shaped, stepwise pathway seen in the transition path ensemble. This S-shape is absent from the minimum-free-energy path: it arises from the non-equilibrium dynamics of the short ($\sim 0.13$ ps) transition events combined with the mass asymmetry between heavy-atom and hydrogen-bearing dihedrals. An interpretable, machine-learned committor thus exposes dynamical features of the mechanism to which the free-energy surface is blind. The workflow requires no prior assumptions about the reaction coordinate and extends naturally to other isomerizations and to chemical reactions more broadly.

AI.tldr: 本文利用AIMMD方法研究视黄醛C₁₃=C₁₄双键的热致顺反异构化机制。通过无偏分子动力学轨迹学习committor，发现四个二面角（非 improper 二面角）构成反应坐标，符号回归揭示非线性耦合产生S形步进路径，该路径源于非平衡动力学和质量不对称，自由能面无法捕捉。
AI.motivation: 视黄醛C₁₃=C₁₄双键的热致顺反异构是一个高能垒的原型反应，其机制依赖于微妙的离面弯曲运动，但传统方法难以准确刻画反应坐标和动力学细节。
AI.method: 采用AIMMD方法，通过双向射击生成无偏分子动力学轨迹，用神经网络学习committor的对数几率（logit）而非committor本身，结合保留输入随机化识别关键坐标，再通过符号回归提炼为紧凑解析表达式。
AI.result: 识别出四个 proper 二面角为信息坐标（improper 二面角不适用）；符号回归表明非线性耦合所有四个二面角才能重现过渡路径系综中的S形步进路径；该S形在最小自由能路径中缺失，源于~0.13 ps短时间过渡事件的非平衡动力学和重原子与含氢二面角之间的质量不对称。
AI.conclusion: 可解释的机器学习committor暴露了自由能面无法感知的动力学机制特征，且该方法无需对反应坐标做先验假设，可推广至其他异构化反应及更广泛的化学反应。

title: Testing the robustness of topological quantities evaluated from the modular Hamiltonian for a given wavefunction
summary: Topologically ordered states are characterized by topological quantities like the Hall conductance, topological entanglement entropy, and chiral central charge. Techniques based on the modular Hamiltonian have recently been developed to extract these quantities from a wavefunction. Here, we consider a lattice model of fractional quantum Hall states, a prototypical example of topologically ordered systems, and extract their topological content using the modular Hamiltonian-based methods. We consider the bosonic Laughlin and Moore-Read states and show that the extracted topological quantum numbers converge to their expected results. As expected, the convergence is slower when the correlation length of the state is longer. Generally, our results show that a reliable extraction of topological content through modular methods requires the usage of large systems

AI.tldr: 本文利用模哈密顿量方法从分数量子霍尔态的晶格模型中提取拓扑量子数，验证了该方法在Laughlin和Moore-Read态上的有效性，并指出大系统尺寸是实现可靠提取的必要条件。
AI.motivation: 拓扑序的刻画需要提取拓扑不变量（如霍尔电导、拓扑纠缠熵等），而模哈密顿量方法为从波函数中提取这些量提供了新途径。本文旨在将该方法应用于分数量子霍尔态的晶格模型，验证其可行性。
AI.method: 采用模哈密顿量方法，对玻色子Laughlin态和Moore-Read态这两种典型的分数量子霍尔态进行拓扑量子数的数值提取，并通过改变系统尺寸观察收敛行为。
AI.result: 提取的拓扑量子数收敛到预期值。态的相关长度越长，收敛速度越慢。大系统尺寸是可靠提取拓扑内容的前提。
AI.conclusion: 模哈密顿量方法能有效提取分数量子霍尔态的拓扑内容，但需要足够大的系统尺寸以确保结果可靠，尤其对于相关长度较长的拓扑序态。

title: Boundary-Robust Transmission Asymmetry as a Topological Signature in Open Floquet Lattices
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures. Short article focusing on the boundary-robust topological transmission signature in open Floquet lattices and its experimental implications. Companion scattering-state theory paper: arXiv:2601.19991
summary: We identify a boundary-robust topological signature of open Floquet lattices: although nonadiabatic boundaries strongly reshape the transmission lineshape, the integrated left--right transmission asymmetry saturates to a plateau set by the bulk Floquet winding number. Its origin is a deep-bulk branch-population principle: in the long-sample limit, each propagating Floquet--Bloch branch is generically populated with unit weight, since true Floquet bound states are nongeneric. The robust observable is therefore the cumulative transmission imbalance rather than the boundary-sensitive transmission profile. We propose direct detection by cold-atom transmission spectroscopy. For electronic transport, the same asymmetry admits contact-model-dependent electrical readouts: a coherent Floquet--Landauer--Büttiker interpretation predicts a near-\(2ef\) response in weak SAW devices, whereas a blocking-factor post-processing yields a qualitatively different signal.

AI.tldr: 本文发现开放Floquet晶格中边界鲁棒拓扑签名：虽然非绝热边界会强烈改变透射线形，但累积的左-右透射不对称性饱和于由体Floquet绕数决定的平台。其根源是深体分支布居原理：在长样品极限下，每个传播的Floquet-Bloch分支通常以单位权重被布居，因为真正的Floquet束缚态是非典型的。该鲁棒观测量为累积传输不平衡而非边界敏感的透射轮廓。作者提出通过冷原子透射光谱直接探测，并讨论了电子输运中的接触模型依赖性读出。
AI.motivation: 识别开放Floquet晶格中受拓扑保护的鲁棒可观测量，解决非绝热边界效应导致传统透射谱不鲁棒的问题。
AI.method: 通过深体分支布居原理（deep-bulk branch-population principle）理论分析，结合Floquet-Landauer-Büttiker输运框架和接触模型分析。
AI.result: 左-右透射不对称性的积分量（累积传输不平衡）饱和于体Floquet绕数决定的平台，该量对边界不敏感；电子输运中信号依赖于接触模型（相干解释给出近2ef响应，阻塞因子后处理给出不同信号）。
AI.conclusion: 累积传输不平衡是开放Floquet晶格中可观测的边界鲁棒拓扑签名，可通过冷原子光谱直接检测，电子输运中需谨慎处理接触效应。

title: Sustainability-informed materials design
summary: While material innovation can enable sustainable development, environmental and social impacts of emerging materials are often assessed only after design choices are "locked in." Here, we argue for a shift in perspective: life cycle thinking should enter at the earliest stages of materials development, where uncertainty is highest but design freedom is greatest. Rather than treating incomplete knowledge as a barrier, we reframe it as an inherent feature that can illuminate trajectories, tradeoffs, and consequences -- and enable intervention while change remains possible. Focusing on inorganic solid materials, we identify disconnects between materials science and sustainability analysis, propose an adaptable, decision-oriented framework to embed sustainability into material design across evolving technology stages, and highlight how recent advances such as predictive synthesis can help operationalize this integration. Guided by the framework's governing principles, we outline a cross-stakeholder agenda to shift from retrospective correction to anticipatory, responsible material design from the outset.

AI.tldr: 本文主张将生命周期思维提前引入材料开发的早期阶段，在不确定性最高但设计自由度最大的时候进行可持续发展评估，并提出一个面向决策的框架来整合材料科学与可持续性分析。
AI.motivation: 新兴材料的环境和社会影响往往在设计方案"锁定"之后才被评估，错过了干预的最佳时机。因此，需要转变思路，将生命周期思维前置到材料开发的最早期。
AI.method: 聚焦无机固体材料，识别材料科学与可持续性分析之间的脱节；提出一个可适应、面向决策的框架，将可持续性嵌入到跨技术演进阶段的材料设计中；借助预测合成等前沿进展来实现这一整合。
AI.result: 识别了材料科学与可持续性分析之间的脱节；提出了一个将可持续性嵌入材料设计的框架；指出了预测合成等前沿方法如何助力该整合的落地。
AI.conclusion: 需要从"事后修正"转向"前瞻性、负责任的材料设计"，并提出了跨利益相关方议程以推动这一转变。

title: A Single Twist-Angle Selection Method for the Electronic Structure of Bilayer Materials
summary: Structure factor twist averaging (sfTA) is a newer method that has been shown to reproduce twist-averaged (TA) CCSD energies for bulk systems at a low computational cost. In this work, we extend this method for the treatment of low-dimensional materials in the form of two variants: paired sfTA and binding sfTA. These variants affect which twist angles are used in the sfTA protocol, as well as how the special twist angle is selected, namely by using the binding structure factor. These changes are meant to incorporate the binding interaction into the twist-angle selection algorithm within sfTA. Both variants are tested on a variety of bilayer systems, and the resulting binding correlation energies are compared to original sfTA results. We show that the variants are able to produce results approaching TA, with binding sfTA producing the most accurate energies. We also use contour plots of the test systems to show that these improvements are most likely caused by a cancellation of errors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了结构因子扭角平均（sfTA）的两种变体——配对sfTA和结合sfTA，用于处理低维材料（如双层体系）的结合能计算。结合sfTA通过将结合相互作用纳入扭角选择算法，在保持低计算成本的同时，能最准确地逼近完整扭角平均（TA）的CCSD能量结果。通过等高线图分析，这些改进主要源于误差抵消。
AI.motivation: 现有的sfTA方法能高效复现体相材料的扭角平均能量，但尚未针对低维材料（如双层体系）中的结合相互作用进行优化。本文旨在扩展sfTA方法，使其能够准确且低成本地处理低维材料的结合能计算。
AI.method: 提出两种变体：配对sfTA和结合sfTA。二者修改了sfTA协议中扭角的选择方式，其中结合sfTA利用结合结构因子（binding structure factor）来选择特殊扭角，从而将层间结合相互作用纳入算法。在多种双层体系上测试，并与原始sfTA及完整TA结果进行对比。
AI.result: 两种变体都能接近TA结果，其中结合sfTA产生的能量最准确。通过等高线图分析表明，这些改进主要是由于误差抵消效应。
AI.conclusion: sfTA方法可以扩展至低维材料体系，结合sfTA变体通过误差抵消机制在低成本下实现了高精度的结合能计算，为今后处理低维周期性系统的相关能量计算提供了有效方案。

title: Universal tracer statistics in single-file transport
summary: We uncover an emergent universality in the large-scale, long-time statistics of a one-dimensional hard-rod gas evolving under two fundamentally different classes of microscopic dynamics: stochastic (diffusive) and unitary (ballistic). Remarkably, despite the difference of the two systems, the one-time joint distribution of the positions of multiple tracers exhibits identical non-Gaussian fluctuations, up to a simple dynamical scaling. This universality holds in both annealed and quenched ensembles, demonstrating a persistent memory of the initial state. Differences between the dynamics manifest at large scales only in multi-time statistics. Our conclusions are based on explicit large-deviation results for the one-time statistics of tracer pairs and the two-time statistics of a single tracer. Similar physics extends to current fluctuations, demonstrated explicitly in the quenched ensemble. We obtain these results from exact microscopic solutions for both dynamics and, independently, from fluctuating hydrodynamics in the ballistic case in the annealed ensemble. Our rare-event simulations further corroborate these findings and provide a novel demonstration of sampling atypical fluctuations in both types of hard-rod gas.

AI.tldr: 一维硬杆气体在随机（扩散）和幺正（弹道）两种微观动力学下，大尺度长时间统计表现出普适性：多示踪粒子单时刻联合分布的非高斯涨落相同（仅需简单动力学缩放），差异仅体现在多时刻统计中。
AI.motivation: 探索不同微观动力学（随机vs幺正）下硬杆气体在大尺度长时间行为中是否存在统计上的普适性，以及初始状态记忆是否持续。
AI.method: 通过精确微观解析解、涨落流体力学理论以及稀有事件模拟，分析硬杆气体中示踪粒子的单时刻与多时刻统计特性。
AI.result: 发现单时刻多示踪粒子联合分布的非高斯涨落具有普适性（仅相差动力学缩放因子），但多时刻统计会区分不同动力学。退火与淬火系综中均成立，且类似现象存在于电流涨落中。
AI.conclusion: 硬杆气体在大尺度下的非高斯涨落呈现意想不到的普适性，但多时刻统计能揭示微观动力学的本质差异。

title: Cosine bands, flat bands and superconductivity in orthorhombic iron selenide
summary: Electronic band structures (EBSs) for orthorhombic beta FeSe1-x at less than 16 K and up to 23 GPa using experimentally determined cell dimensions are evaluated for cosine-shaped bands near, or crossing, EF. Cosine shaped bands are present in reciprocal directions parallel to the c axis at all pressures. Calculations using a P1 cell derived from Cmma symmetry with a 2c superlattice moderates the effect of intersecting bands to 9.0 GPa. This approach enables determination of a superconducting gap consistent with experimentally determined values. Key influences on charge distribution and transfer in the interplanar region of beta FeSe1-x are lone pair electrons which feature as flat bands (FBs) near EF along GZ in an EBS. FBs also influence the topology of Fermi surfaces as pressure increases and in directions parallel to the c* direction (i.e. offset along ky) within the Brillouin zone. At the Fermi surface along b*, cosine bands split and align favorably for electron-hole pairing with nodal inflection points located at EF. For P greater than 12.0 GPa, FBs interact with folded cosine bands invoking additional band dispersions. These calculations suggest that FBs participate in, and with increased pressure, enhance and sustain the superconducting properties of beta FeSe1-x to 23 GPa.

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算正交相β-FeSe1-x在低温高压下的电子能带结构，发现余弦形能带和扁平带（FBs）对超导特性有重要影响。扁平带参与超导，并在压力增加时增强和维持超导性能至23 GPa。
AI.motivation: 理解β-FeSe1-x在高压下的电子能带结构变化，特别是余弦形能带和扁平带如何影响超导特性，以解释实验观测到的超导间隙和费米面拓扑。
AI.method: 基于实验确定的晶胞参数，在16 K以下、高达23 GPa的压力范围内，计算正交相β-FeSe1-x的电子能带结构；使用源自Cmma对称性且带有2c超晶格的P1晶胞，分析余弦形能带和扁平带的演化。
AI.result: 余弦形能带在所有压力下沿c轴平行方向存在；P1晶胞计算将相交能带效应缓和至9.0 GPa，得到的超导间隙与实验值一致；孤对电子表现为沿GZ方向的扁平带（FBs），影响层间电荷分布与转移；FBs随压力增加影响费米面拓扑；在b*方向费米面上，余弦能带分裂并形成适合电子-空穴配对的结构；超过12.0 GPa时，FBs与折叠余弦能带相互作用引发额外能带色散。
AI.conclusion: 扁平带（FBs）参与超导过程，并在压力增加时增强和维持β-FeSe1-x的超导性能至23 GPa。

title: Vib2Conf: AI-driven discrimination of molecular conformations from vibrational spectra
summary: Retrieving or generating two-dimensional molecular structures on the basis of vibrational spectra has been well demonstrated via deep learning models. However, deciphering three-dimensional molecular conformations is still challenging, primarily due to spectral ambiguities caused by conformational heterogeneity, which are difficult to resolve. To address this limitation, we propose Vib2Conf, a deep learning model directly discriminating 3D molecular conformations from vibrational spectra. We implement an attentional resampler to distill conformation-sensitive features from sparse spectral signals, and integrate Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) to partition the conformational space for precise geometric mapping. These modules enable Vib2Conf to achieve state-of-the-art top-1 recall exceeding 95% on traditional spectrum-structure benchmarks, including QM9S, VB-Mols, and QMe14S. More importantly, Vib2Conf can discriminate near-isomeric conformers with a top-1 recall of 82.06% on VB-Confs test set, where conformational isomers differ by a root-mean-square deviation (RMSD) of only ~1 Å. In general, Vib2Conf is a promising method for fine-grained spectrum-to-conformation analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出Vib2Conf模型，通过注意力重采样器和混合专家模块从振动光谱中直接判别3D分子构象，在多个基准上实现超过95%的top-1召回率，并能区分RMSD仅~1Å的近异构构象。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型可基于振动光谱检索或生成二维分子结构，但解析三维分子构象仍具挑战，主要因为构象异质性导致的光谱模糊性难以分辨。
AI.method: 提出Vib2Conf模型，包含注意力重采样器（attentional resampler）从稀疏光谱信号中提取构象敏感特征，并集成混合专家（Mixture-of-Experts, MoE）模块划分构象空间以实现精确几何映射。
AI.result: 在QM9S、VB-Mols、QMe14S等传统光谱-结构基准上实现超过95%的state-of-the-art top-1召回率；在VB-Confs测试集上对RMSD仅~1Å的近异构构象判别达到82.06%的top-1召回率。
AI.conclusion: Vib2Conf是一种有前景的细粒度光谱到构象分析方法，能有效解决振动光谱中的构象异质性难题。

title: Dichroic Raman probes for chiral edge modes
summary: The identification and manipulation of charge-neutral fractionalized quasi-particles, in particular chiral edge modes (CEM), is a long-standing quest in physics. Remarkably, the microscopically mediated interaction between light and charge-neutral excitations in Mott-Hubbard insulators can take an identical form to the Raman coupling between light and particles with electric charge. However, since CEMs are Raman-inactive due to conservation of lattice momentum, Raman probes have been deemed unsuitable for their identification. Here, using the Kitaev quantum spin liquid (KSL) as an illustrative example, we demonstrate that the long-range correlated disorder inherent to a closed edge can lead to a Raman circular dichroism (RCD) signal that avoids suppression by linear and angular momentum selection rules, and exhibits a dependence on experimentally tunable length and energy scales that are characteristic of CEM. Having calculated the low-frequency RCD response of generic KSL, we argue that the interaction of the chiral matter fermion with the $\Ztwo$ boundary charge leaves a unique fingerprint of the KSL via the anisotropic Zeeman field dependence.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过拉曼圆二色性（RCD）信号间接探测Kitaev量子自旋液体中的手性边缘模（CEM），这些模式在传统拉曼光谱中因动量守恒而不可见。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，识别和操控电荷中性的分数化准粒子（特别是手性边缘模CEM）是物理学中的重要课题。由于CEM在拉曼测量中不活跃，传统认为拉曼探针不适用于识别它们，亟需新的探测方法。
AI.method: 以Kitaev量子自旋液体为示例，利用封闭边缘固有的长程相关无序性，使拉曼圆二色性信号避免线性和角动量选择规则的抑制，并通过计算低频RCD响应来展示其与CEM特征的联系。
AI.result: 证明了在Kitaev量子自旋液体中，通过RCD信号可以探测原本拉曼不活跃的CEM，且该信号依赖于实验中可调的长度和能量尺度，具有CEM的特征性行为。
AI.conclusion: 手性物质费米子与Z2边界电荷的相互作用通过各向异性塞曼场依赖性为Kitaev量子自旋液体留下独特的指纹，为识别电荷中性分数化准粒子提供了新途径。

title: Mesoscopic Josephson effect in graphene disk at magnetic field
comment: RevTeX, 6 pages, 3 figures. To be presented on "Physics of Magnetism 2026 (PM'26)", June 22-26, 2026, Poznań, Poland
summary: Unlike for tunneling Josephson junctions, for which the current-phase relation is given by the sine function, with the critical current ($I_c$) and normal-state resistance ($R_N$) following the relation $I_cR_N=(π/2)\,Δ_0/e$ (where $Δ_0$ is the superconducting gap and electron charge is $-e$), mesoscopic Josephson junctions show more complex current-phase relations, with the skewness $S>0$, what is related to the presence -- in case the leads are in the normal state -- of transmission probabilities taking the values comparable to $1$. Here, we show that these features also appear for a superconductor-graphene-superconductor (S-g-S) junction in the disk-shaped (Corbino) geometry, when the magnetic field is adjusted such that $I_c\rightarrow{}0$ and $R_N\rightarrow{}\infty$. In such a case, the product $I_cR_N\approx{}1.85\,Δ_0/e$, and the skewness $S\approx{}0.14$. The results obtained from quantum-mechanical mode-matching analysis for the Dirac-Bogoliubov-De-Gennes equation are compared with simpler model assuming incoherent scattering between two circular interfaces separating the sample and the leads.

AI.tldr: 本文研究超导-石墨烯-超导（S-g-S）圆盘（Corbino）结在磁场调节至临界电流趋零、电阻发散的极限下的约瑟夫森效应，发现其电流-相位关系偏离标准正弦形式，呈现有限偏斜度，且IcRN乘积约为1.85Δ₀/e。
AI.motivation: 传统隧道结的电流-相位关系为正弦函数，IcRN乘积为定值；而介观结因透射概率接近1而呈现更复杂的电流-相位关系（偏斜度>0）。作者欲探究在Corbino几何的S-g-S结中，当磁场使Ic→0且RN→∞时是否也出现类似特征。
AI.method: 采用量子力学模式匹配法分析Dirac-Bogoliubov-De-Gennes方程，并将结果与简化的非相干散射模型（在两个圆形界面之间）进行对比。
AI.result: 在磁场调节至Ic→0且RN→∞的极限下，IcRN≈1.85Δ₀/e，偏斜度S≈0.14。
AI.conclusion: Corbino几何的S-g-S结在特定磁场条件下表现出与介观结类似的非正弦电流-相位关系，其IcRN乘积和偏斜度均为有限值，反映了透射概率接近于1的输运特性。

title: RKKY interaction in altermagnets with adiabatic electron-phonon coupling
summary: Altermagnets, characterized by time-reversal symmetry breaking without net magnetization and momentum-dependent spin-split bands, offer a promising platform for spintronics due to their anisotropic spin textures and potential for tunable magnetic interactions. Here, we theoretically investigate the slow phonon-renormalized Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) interaction in two-dimensional Rashba $d$-wave altermagnets, incorporating arbitrary Rashba spin-orbit coupling (RSOC) strength and spin-dependent static-Holstein electron-phonon coupling (EPC). Using a continuum model Hamiltonian that captures altermagnetic anisotropy, RSOC, and adiabatic lattice distortions, we compute the noncollinear RKKY exchange tensor via second-order perturbation theory and numerical momentum-space integration. Our results reveal that static lattice distortions provide a versatile tuning knob for engineering the magnitude, anisotropy, and chirality of RKKY couplings: moderate EPC suppresses long-range coherence while inducing component-specific phase shifts and sign reversals, particularly in Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya and compass-like terms, enabling control over ferromagnetic/antiferromagnetic alignments and clockwise/counterclockwise chiralities. Systematic parameter scans demonstrate enhanced oscillatory complexity with altermagnetic order, RSOC, and doping. These findings establish slow phonons as a low-energy tuning knob that systematically controls the magnitude, anisotropy, phase, and chirality of noncollinear RKKY couplings - even at arbitrary Rashba strength - thereby providing a practical route to engineer ferromagnetic/antiferromagnetic alignments and clockwise/counterclockwise DM chiralities in altermagnet-based heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文理论研究了二维Rashba d波交变磁体中慢声子重正化的RKKY相互作用，发现静态晶格畸变可通过电子-声子耦合有效调控RKKY交换的强度、各向异性和手性，为交变磁体自旋电子学提供了新的调控手段。
