AI.motivation: 交变磁体具有时间反演对称性破缺且无净磁化、动量依赖的自旋分裂能带等特性，是自旋电子学的理想平台。然而，如何有效调控其磁相互作用仍是一个关键问题。本文旨在探索慢声子（通过电子-声子耦合）作为一种低能调控手段来工程化交变磁体中的RKKY相互作用。
AI.method: 采用包含交变磁各向异性、任意强度Rashba自旋轨道耦合和自旋依赖静态Holstein电子-声子耦合的连续模型哈密顿量，通过二阶微扰理论和数值动量空间积分计算非共线RKKY交换张量。
AI.result: 静态晶格畸变能有效调控RKKY耦合的强度、各向异性和手性；适度的电子-声子耦合抑制长程相干性，同时诱导特定分量的相位移动和符号反转，尤其影响Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya和compass-like项；交变磁序、Rashba自旋轨道耦合和掺杂增强了振荡的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 慢声子可作为有效的低能调控手段，系统控制非共线RKKY耦合的强度、各向异性、相位和手性，为在交变磁体异质结构中工程化铁磁/反铁磁对齐和DM手性提供了实用途径。

title: Nonintegral Flux Trapping in Frustrated Josephson Networks of Triplet Superconductors
summary: In a Josephson junction network, anisotropic coupling between spin triplet pairing correlations can lead to frustrated $d$ vector textures that support spontaneous Josephson currents and nonintegral flux trapping. Such networks can appear in superconducting polycrystals, as well as single-crystal superconductors. In analogy to classical spin systems, in which the presence of geometric frustration and anisotropic superexchange can lead to nontrivial spin textures, Josephson networks with anisotropic Josephson couplings cannot simultaneously optimize their $\mathrm{U}(1)$ superconducting phase difference and relative $d$ vector orientations. The internal pairing structure of Cooper pairs twists as they tunnel across the Josephson junction, and the $d$ vector texture enters as an emergent geometric phase which can spontaneously trap fractional flux. For unitary triplet pairing order, this mechanism can support $π$-flux trapping above a critical value of antisymmetric Josephson coupling, and is distinct from usual half-quantum vortices. The results of this work reveal new routes to engineer frustrated Josephson networks from the interplay of magnetic textures and spin triplet superconducting pairing order.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了约瑟夫森结网络中，自旋三重态配对关联的各向异性耦合如何导致受挫的d矢量织构，进而产生自发约瑟夫森电流和非整数磁通俘获。该机制类似于经典自旋系统中的几何受挫，可在超导多晶和单晶中出现，并提供了一种通过磁织构与自旋三重态超导配对序的相互作用来设计受挫约瑟夫森网络的新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索约瑟夫森结网络中因自旋三重态配对序的各向异性耦合导致的几何受挫效应，揭示d矢量织构如何自发俘获分数磁通，并区分于传统的半量子涡旋。
AI.method: 通过类比经典自旋系统中的几何受挫和各向异性超交换作用，建立约瑟夫森网络模型，分析U(1)超导相位差与d矢量取向之间的竞争关系，研究库珀对隧穿时内部配对结构的扭曲以及d矢量织构作为 emergent geometric phase 的角色。
AI.result: 对于幺正三重态配对序，当反对称约瑟夫森耦合超过临界值时，该机制可支持π-磁通俘获；这种分数磁通俘获不同于通常的半量子涡旋。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作揭示了通过磁织构与自旋三重态超导配对序的相互作用来设计受挫约瑟夫森网络的新途径。

title: Enhancing molecular dynamics with equivariant machine-learned densities
summary: Machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have enabled molecular dynamics at near ab initio accuracy, yet remain limited to energies and forces by construction, leaving electronic observables such as dipole moments and polarizabilities inaccessible. We introduce DenSNet, a density-first approach to machine-learned electronic structure that learns the Hohenberg--Kohn map from nuclear configurations to the ground-state electron density. Our approach employs an SE(3)-equivariant neural network to predict density coefficients of a flexible atom-centered Gaussian basis, combined with a $Δ$-learning strategy that uses superposed atomic densities as a prior to accelerate training. A second equivariant network then maps the predicted density to the total energy, providing a unified framework for molecular dynamics and electronic structure. We validate DenSNet on ethanol, ethanethiol, and resorcinol, where infrared spectra from machine-learned trajectories show excellent agreement with experimental gas-phase measurements. To test scalability, we train on polythiophene oligomers with 1--6 monomers and extrapolate to chains of up to 12 monomers, generating stable long-time trajectories whose infrared spectra agree with reference density functional theory calculations. Here, we show that reinstating the electron density as the central learned quantity opens a practical route to transferable prediction of spectroscopic and electronic observables in large-scale molecular simulations.

AI.tldr: DenSNet是一种密度优先的机器学习方法，通过SE(3)等变神经网络学习从核构型到基态电子密度的Hohenberg-Kohn映射，结合Δ学习策略和原子密度叠加先验，实现了对能量及电子可观测量（如偶极矩、极化率）的统一预测，在乙醇、乙硫醇、间苯二酚和聚噻吩低聚物上验证了红外光谱与实验/DFT参考的高度一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习原子间势能（MLIPs）仅能预测能量和力，无法获得偶极矩、极化率等电子可观测量，限制了其在光谱学和电子结构性质预测中的应用。
AI.method: 提出DenSNet框架：1) 使用SE(3)等变神经网络预测原子中心高斯基组的密度系数；2) 采用Δ学习策略，以叠加原子密度作为先验加速训练；3) 用第二个等变网络将预测密度映射到总能量，统一分子动力学与电子结构预测。
AI.result: 在乙醇、乙硫醇、间苯二酚上，从机器学习轨迹获得的红外光谱与实验气相测量结果高度一致；在1-6单体聚噻吩上训练后，可外推至12单体链，生成稳定长轨迹且红外光谱与DFT参考一致。
AI.conclusion: 将电子密度重新确立为核心学习量为大规模分子模拟中光谱和电子可观测量的可迁移预测提供了一条实用途径。

title: Umklapp corrections to Landau damping and conditions for non-trivial modifications to quantum critical transport
summary: We compute the particle--hole bubble for an Ising-nematic metal when the critical Fermi surface approaches the Brillouin zone boundary for $d=2$ dimensions. We find two qualitatively distinct contributions: i)~the standard antipodal piece, which gives $Π_{\rm{ATP}}(\mathbf{q}, iΩ)\proptoΩ/q$ and ii)~an additional umklapp piece from electrons near the zone boundary, which gives $Π_{\rm{U}}(\mathbf{q}, iΩ)\propto Ω^α$ at the minimum umklapp momentum $q\approx Δ_q$ with $α= 2/3 $ or $1/2$ depending on the temperature $T$. At high $T$ when $α= 1/2$, the minimum $T$ for the activation of linear/quasi-linear in $T$ resistivity, which is expected to be $T_U \propto Δ_q^3$ from $z=3$ criticality, could potentially get reduced to $T_U \propto Δ_q^4$ due to the $\sqrtΩ$ term and discuss why we find only one hyper-specific scenario where this possibility might be realized. For $d=3$ the umklapp contribution gives $Π_{\rm{U}}\sim Ω$ irrespective of $T$ therefore $T_U$ is not modified in this case.

AI.tldr: 本文计算了二维Ising向列金属中临界费米面靠近布里渊区边界时的粒子-空穴气泡，发现两种贡献：标准对极项（Π∝Ω/q）和来自区边界电子的Umklapp项（Π∝Ω^α，α=2/3或1/2）。Umklapp项可能降低线性电阻率的激活温度TU，但只在特定条件下成立。
AI.motivation: 研究临界费米面靠近布里渊区边界时，Umklapp过程对粒子-空穴气泡（极化函数）的影响，以及这种影响如何改变电阻率随温度变化的特征温度TU。
AI.method: 在d=2和d=3维度下，分别计算标准对极贡献和Umklapp贡献的极化函数Π(q,iΩ)，分析其频散关系和温度依赖性，推导TU的标度律。
AI.result: d=2时，Umklapp贡献在最小Umklapp动量附近给出Π∝Ω^α，α=2/3或1/2（依赖温度）。α=1/2时，TU可能从z=3临界性预期的∝Δ_q^3降低为∝Δ_q^4。d=3时，Umklapp贡献始终Π∝Ω，TU不改变。
AI.conclusion: Umklapp过程在d=2中能显著修改极化函数的低频行为（从Ω/q变为Ω^α），可能降低线性电阻率的激活温度，但该修改仅在非常特定的超特定场景下才能实现。

title: A Symmetric Unified Transport and Charge Model for MOSFETs from Diffusive to Ballistic Regimes
summary: This paper presents a symmetric unified transport (UT) compact model for MOSFETs that bridges drift-diffusion (DD) and ballistic transport (BT) regimes. The proposed model self consistently accounts for both current and charge across the DD-BT transition. Quantum capacitance and carrier transport are incorporated into the charge density formulation. Drain side velocity saturation and the source side thermal velocity limit are unified within a single framework using a physically motivated high field scattering length, enabling accurate modeling from DD square law behavior to the ballistic limit. In addition, a physical channel charge and capacitance model is developed to capture capacitance reduction in the quasi ballistic regime, which is not considered in standard compact models. The model is verified using theoretical analysis and experimental data from MOSFETs with multiple channel lengths, achieving accurate fitting using only physical transport parameters. The formulation is continuous and symmetric, and it passes both DC and AC symmetry tests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对称的统一输运（UT）紧凑模型，桥接了MOSFET的漂移-扩散（DD）与弹道输运（BT）区域，自洽地处理了电流和电荷，并考虑了量子电容、速度饱和及热速度限制，通过了DC和AC对称性验证。
AI.motivation: 现有紧凑模型无法连续覆盖从漂移-扩散到弹道输运的过渡区域，且缺乏对准弹道区域电容减少效应的准确描述。
AI.method: 基于物理的高场散射长度统一了漏端速度饱和与源端热速度限制，将量子电容和载流子输运纳入电荷密度公式，并开发了物理的沟道电荷和电容模型。
AI.result: 通过理论分析和不同沟道长度MOSFET的实验数据验证，仅使用物理输运参数即可实现精确拟合，并通过了DC和AC对称性测试。
AI.conclusion: 该模型连续且对称，能准确描述从DD平方律行为到弹道极限的输运特性，并捕捉准弹道区的电容降低效应。

title: Effective phonon models based on symmetry-adapted multipole basis -- Hidden chiral phonon angular momentum splitting in ferroaxial systems
summary: We propose a symmetry-based framework for constructing effective harmonic phonon models using a symmetry-adapted multipole basis. By decomposing the force-constant matrix into bond-centered electric multipoles, we identify the minimal microscopic ingredients responsible for phonon angular-momentum splitting. Applying this framework to a minimal zigzag-chain model, we show that ferroaxial order gives rise to a hidden sublattice-resolved chiral phonons, while an additional polar contribution leads to finite global chirality. Our results provide a unified symmetry-based description of hidden and emergent phonon phenomena and suggest a route to control phonon properties via electronic orderings and external fields.

AI.tldr: 提出基于对称性的多极子框架，通过力常数矩阵分解为键中心电多极子，揭示声子角动量劈裂的微观机制，并应用于锯齿链模型发现铁轴向序导致隐藏的手性声子。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以统一描述隐藏声子现象和新兴声子现象，缺乏基于对称性的微观框架来理解声子角动量劈裂的起源。
AI.method: 将力常数矩阵分解为键中心电多极子（对称性适配的多极基），识别导致声子角动量劈裂的最小微观成分，并应用于最小锯齿链模型。
AI.result: 发现铁轴向序产生隐藏的子晶格分辨手性声子，额外极性贡献导致有限全局手性。
AI.conclusion: 提供了隐藏和新兴声子现象的统一对称性描述，为通过电子序和外场调控声子性质开辟了新途径。

title: Errors that matter: Uncertainty-aware universal machine-learning potentials calibrated on experiments
summary: Machine-learning models of atomic-scale interactions achieve the accuracy of the quantum mechanical calculations on which they are trained, but at a dramatically lower computational cost. Their predictions can be made trustworthy by uncertainty quantification techniques that estimate the residual error relative to their reference. These errors, however, do not include uncertainty contributions from the approximations inherent in the electronic structure calculations, which are often the main source of discrepancy with empirical observations. We construct an ensemble of ML potentials trained on multiple electronic-structure references and calibrate it against experimental data on cohesive energies, atomization energies, lattice constants and bulk moduli of simple materials and molecules, similar to the uncertainty-aware functional distribution approach. The resulting ensemble of models, which we call PET-UAFD, can be used to simulate matter across a wide range of compositions and thermodynamic conditions. By comparison with experimental measurements of the density and structure of liquids, we demonstrate that, even outside the static properties on which it was calibrated, PET-UAFD enables predictions that are as accurate against experiments as the best available electronic-structure reference and that the spread in the ensemble can be used to assess the reliability of such predictions. We also introduce the PET-EXP protocol that uses shallow ensembles and statistical reweighting techniques to provide accurate estimates of uncertainty relative to experimental measurements at virtually no additional cost over a simulation based on a single conventional ML potential. Ultimately, this approach provides a practical and inexpensive approach to elevate machine-learning potentials from faithful interpolators of approximate theories to genuinely predictive tools anchored in experimental reality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PET-UAFD方法，通过构建基于多个电子结构参考的机器学习势集成，并利用实验数据进行校准，使得ML势不仅能复现量子力学精度，还能考虑电子结构近似带来的不确定性，从而产生真正具有预测能力的工具。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习势的不确定性量化仅考虑相对于参考计算（如DFT）的残差，而忽略了电子结构计算本身的近似误差（如交换关联泛函近似），这通常是理论与实验偏差的主要来源。因此需要构建能够反映并校准这种系统偏差的方法。
AI.method: 1) 构建基于多个不同电子结构参考（多种泛函）的ML势集成模型（PET-UAFD）；2) 利用实验数据（内聚能、原子化能、晶格常数、体模量）对集成模型进行校准，类似不确定度感知的泛函分布方法；3) 提出PET-EXP协议，使用浅层集成和统计重加权技术，在不增加额外计算成本的情况下估计相对于实验测量的不确定性。
AI.result: 1) PET-UAFD在液体密度和结构等动态性质上的预测精度与最佳电子结构参考相当；2) 集成的离散度可以有效评估预测的可靠性；3) PET-EXP协议能以几乎零额外成本提供准确的实验不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将ML势从精确的近似理论插值器提升为真正以实验现实为锚点的预测性工具，提供了一种实用且廉价的不确定性量化方案。

title: Field-induced jammed polyhex spin liquid in the honeycomb Ising antiferromagnet
summary: We analyze the ground state properties of the honeycomb Ising antiferromagnet in an external magnetic field. We demonstrate the existence of extensive ground state degeneracy at finite field that maps to a polyhex tiling problem. This state is shown to be a jammed spin liquid, with no local zero modes connecting ground states. Through Monte Carlo simulations, we explore the properties of these states and show that the spin diffusion can be controlled by the magnetic field strength. By considering quantum fluctuations, we demonstrate that transverse coupling partially lifts the ground state degeneracy, selecting an extensive subspace of non-periodic tilings of 12-hexes. We suggest that the jammed polyhex spin liquid phase exists in an experimentally realizable region of parameter space and may be present in the FePX$_3$ compounds.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了蜂窝晶格Ising反铁磁体在外磁场中的基态性质，发现了与多六边形平铺问题对应的广泛基态简并性，证明这是一种堵塞的自旋液体态，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟展示了磁场强度可控制自旋扩散。量子涨落会部分解除基态简并，选择出12-六边形非周期性平铺的子空间。该相在实验上可能存在于FePX₃化合物中。
AI.motivation: 探索蜂窝晶格Ising反铁磁体在外磁场中是否存在新奇的基态相，特别是具有广泛简并性的自旋液体态，并验证其是否在实验可实现的参数范围内存在。
AI.method: 采用理论分析将基态简并映射为多六边形平铺问题；通过蒙特卡洛模拟研究自旋扩散特性；引入量子涨落（横向耦合）分析对基态简并的解除效应。
AI.result: 1. 存在广泛的基态简并性，对应多六边形平铺问题；2. 该状态为堵塞自旋液体，无局域零模连接基态；3. 磁场强度可调控自旋扩散；4. 量子涨落部分解除简并，选择出12-六边形非周期平铺子空间；5. 该相存在于实验可实现的参数区域，可能与FePX₃化合物相关。
AI.conclusion: 发现了蜂窝晶格Ising反铁磁体中一种新的堵塞多六边形自旋液体相，其基态简并与几何平铺问题等价，且磁场可调控其动力学性质。该相在FePX₃化合物中可能被实验观测到，为自旋液体的实验研究提供了新的候选体系。

title: Van Hove Singularity-Driven Topological Magnetism in Twisted MoTe2
summary: Van Hove singularities (vHSs) strongly amplify electron interactions and can stabilize correlated phases in topological bands. Here we report signatures of topological magnetism in large-angle twisted bilayer MoTe2 driven by the interplay of vHSs, strong correlations, and valley topology. In a 4.8 degree device, electrostatic tuning to a vHS produces a spontaneous anomalous Hall hot spot near nu = -1. Combined transport and reflective magnetic circular dichroism measurements indicate that this regime is not governed by magnetization alone, but instead emerges from a correlated intervalley-coherent antiferromagnetic state that evolves with doping into a canted phase. With increasing magnetic field, the Hall response develops an additional finite-field component consistent with a topological Hall effect from a noncoplanar spin texture, before transitioning into a C = -1 Chern insulator. Our results establish tunable vHSs in moire topological bands as a route to chiral magnetism and engineering topological phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文报道在大角度扭转双层MoTe₂器件中，通过调控范霍夫奇点（vHS）与强关联及谷拓扑的相互作用，观察到拓扑磁性现象，包括自发反常霍尔效应热点、区间谷相干反铁磁态、倾斜相及拓扑霍尔效应，最终转变为C=-1陈绝缘体。
AI.motivation: 范霍夫奇点能强烈放大电子相互作用并稳定拓扑能带中的关联相，但如何利用moire拓扑能带中可调的vHS实现手性磁性和拓扑相变尚待探索。
AI.method: 在4.8度扭转双层MoTe₂器件中，通过静电调控将费米能级调至vHS，结合输运测量和反射磁圆二色性（RMCD）测量，分析霍尔响应和磁性的演化。
AI.result: 在vHS附近ν=-1处观察到自发反常霍尔效应热点；该区域为区间谷相干反铁磁态，随掺杂演变为倾斜相；外加磁场下出现拓扑霍尔效应（非共面自旋织构），最终转变为C=-1陈绝缘体。
AI.conclusion: 可调范霍夫奇点在moire拓扑能带中为手性磁性和拓扑相变工程提供了新途径。

title: Ultra-High Dynamic Strength of Additively Manufactured GRX-810 Under Coupled Conditions of High Strain Rate and Elevated Temperature
summary: Deformation mechanisms in CrCoNi-based oxide-dispersion-strengthened multi-principal element alloys (CrCoNi-based ODS-MPEA) have been extensively studied under quasi-static and low strain rate loading over a wide temperature range, yet their behavior at high strain rates and elevated temperatures remains poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the high strain rate response of the CrCoNi-based ODS-MPEA alloy GRX-810 and its non-ODS variant. The ODS variant contains a high density of hexagonal yttria nanoparticles that serve as the strengthening oxide phase. At high strain rates and ambient temperature, GRX-810 ODS exhibits higher dynamic strength, approximately 2.79 times its quasi-static strength, than both conventional alloys and its non-ODS variant because of the additional athermal strengthening provided by the nanoscale oxide dispersion. At high strain rates and elevated temperatures, however, GRX-810 ODS undergoes thermal softening. This response is consistent with dislocation confinement associated with the small interparticle spacing of the oxide dispersion, which limits the phonon-drag contribution, together with the temperature-dependent reduction of elastic constants that lowers the athermal strengthening terms, including the oxide-related contribution. Additional weakening of the solute-pinning mechanism at elevated temperature further reduces the dynamic yield strength.

AI.tldr: 研究了CrCoNi基ODS-MPEA合金GRX-810在高应变率和高温下的变形行为，发现ODS变体在室温高应变率下强度可达准静态的2.79倍，但在高温下发生热软化，这与氧化物弥散导致的位错限制、弹性常数降低及溶质钉扎减弱有关。
AI.motivation: CrCoNi基ODS-MPEA在准静态和低应变率下的变形机制已被广泛研究，但其在高应变率和高温下的行为尚不清楚，因此需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对比研究GRX-810 ODS合金及其非ODS变体在高应变率下的力学响应，分析氧化物纳米颗粒（六方氧化钇）的强化作用及温度效应。
AI.result: ODS变体在室温高应变率下动态强度是准静态的2.79倍，优于传统合金和非ODS变体；但在高温高应变率下发生热软化。
AI.conclusion: 氧化物弥散的额外无热强化在室温下有效，但高温下由于位错限制（小颗粒间距限制声子拖曳贡献）、弹性常数降低（削弱无热强化项包括氧化物贡献）以及溶质钉扎机制减弱，导致动态屈服强度下降。

title: Computational Design and Experimental Validation of Photoactive PARP1 Inhibitors
summary: Light-activated drugs are a promising way to treat localized diseases for which existing treatments have severe side effects. However, their development is complicated by the set of photophysical and biological properties that must be simultaneously optimized. Here we used computational techniques to find a set of promising candidates for the photoactive inhibition of the poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase 1 (PARP1) cancer target. Using our recently developed methods based on atomistic simulation and machine learning (ML), we screened a set of 5 million hypothetical photoactive ligands. Our workflow used protein-ligand docking to identify candidates with differential PARP1 binding under light and dark conditions; ML force fields and quantum chemistry calculations to predict p$K_\mathrm{a}$, absorption spectra, and thermal half-lives; graph-based surrogate models to screen additional compounds; excited-state nonadiabatic dynamics with ML force fields to estimate quantum yields; and free energy perturbation (FEP) to refine binding predictions. From these predictions, we prioritized a small set of synthetically feasible candidates expected to have red-shifted absorption spectra, thermal half-lives on the order of seconds to minutes, and isomer-dependent PARP1 binding under visible-light control. We synthesized 10 candidates and experimentally characterized their photobehavior and PARP1 inhibition constants. Among the validated compounds, \textbf{1} showed a 15-fold increase in inhibition of PARP1 upon green-light irradiation at 519 nm (208.8 $\pm$ 28.3 $μ$M vs 14.4 $\pm$ 1.9 $μ$M). These results validate the computation-guided screening strategy for identifying red-shifted PARP1 photoinhibitors, while also underscoring current limitations such as rapid thermal relaxation in aqueous media.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算引导的筛选策略，从500万种假设光敏配体中识别出PARP1光抑制剂。通过分子对接、机器学习力场、量子化学计算、图神经网络和非绝热动力学等多尺度计算流程，最终合成并验证了10种候选化合物。其中化合物1在519nm绿光照射下对PARP1的抑制能力提升了15倍（暗态208.8 μM vs 光态14.4 μM）。
AI.motivation: 光激活药物能实现局部疾病治疗且避免现有疗法的严重副作用，但其开发需要同时优化光物理和生物学性质，传统实验试错效率低下。针对PARP1癌症靶点，亟需一种高效的计算机辅助策略来筛选具有理想光响应特性的候选分子。
AI.method: 计算流程包括：1) 蛋白-配体对接筛选光/暗条件下PARP1结合差异；2) 机器学习力场和量子化学计算预测pKa、吸收光谱和热半衰期；3) 基于图的替代模型扩展筛选；4) 机器学习力场的激发态非绝热动力学估算量子产率；5) 自由能微扰优化结合预测。最终合成10种候选物进行实验验证。
AI.result: 化合物1在519nm绿光照射下PARP1抑制常数从暗态的208.8±28.3 μM降至光态的14.4±1.9 μM，提升约15倍。所有候选物均表现出红移吸收光谱、秒至分钟级热半衰期和异构体依赖的PARP1结合能力。
AI.conclusion: 验证了计算引导筛选策略对发现红移PARP1光抑制剂的可行性，同时指出当前局限如水介质中快速热弛豫问题，为光药理学药物开发提供了有效范式。

title: Control of the Néel vector in the quantum antiferromagnetic honeycomb lattice
summary: The switching of antiferromagnetic order and its efficient control promise to enable ultrafast manipulation of data and large storage capacity. Recently, the time-dependent Schwinger boson mean-field theory has been successfully developed to study the Néel vector switching in hypercubic antiferromagnetic lattices. In the present article, we aim at demonstrating that the approach is a well-justified framework to capture the essentials of the switching process, even in low-symmetry quantum antiferromagnets. To this end, we show the possibility of the sublattice magnetization reorientation in the quantum antiferromagnetic honeycomb lattice. First, equilibrium properties of the honeycomb lattice are analyzed using the Schwinger boson mean-field theory and compared to the continuous similarity transformation method to justify the applicability of the approach. Then, the Schwinger boson mean-field theory is employed for switching process. We provide a comprehensive answer to the question what the threshold switching fields are when the coordination number of the lattice is varied. Indeed, the results of the study reveal a correspondence between lattice structures and the threshold fields by comparing them for the square and the simple cubic lattices and the honeycomb lattice. The findings of the present article extend the foundation for future theoretical and computational advancements in the field of antiferromagnetic switching. These advancements are of particular relevance for the development of ultrafast spintronic or magnonic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文利用 Schwinger 玻色子平均场理论研究了量子反铁磁蜂窝晶格中的 Néel 矢量翻转，证实该方法在低对称性反铁磁体中同样适用，并揭示了晶格配位数与阈值翻转场之间的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 验证 Schwinger 玻色子平均场理论在低对称性量子反铁磁体（如蜂窝晶格）中捕捉翻转过程本质的适用性，并探究晶格结构（配位数）对阈值翻转场的影响。
AI.method: 采用 Schwinger 玻色子平均场理论分析蜂窝晶格的平衡态性质，并与连续相似性变换法 (CST) 对比验证其适用性；随后利用该理论模拟翻转动力学过程，比较不同晶格（方形、简单立方、蜂窝）的阈值翻转场。
AI.result: 成功实现了蜂窝晶格中的子晶格磁化重定向；发现了晶格配位数与阈值翻转场之间的对应关系——不同晶格结构对应不同的阈值场。
AI.conclusion: Schwinger 玻色子平均场理论是研究低对称性量子反铁磁体翻转的有效框架，研究结果为超快自旋电子学和磁振子学器件的理论发展奠定了基础。

title: Observation of Erratic Non-Hermitian Skin Effect in Phononic Crystals
summary: The erratic non-Hermitian skin effect (ENHSE), emerging from the interplay between disorders and locally nonreciprocal yet globally reciprocal couplings, has reshaped the conventional bulk-boundary correspondence through its disorder-dependent localization properties. Here, we experimentally observe the dynamical phenomena of ENHSE in phononic crystals with disordered imaginary gauge fields. The erratic localization occurs in the bulk independent of the excitation position, with the main and satellite peaks precisely located at the local maxima of the cumulative gauge field in accordance with random-walk extreme-value statistics. Remarkably, the selective manipulation of satellite peaks can be realized by tuning the staggered disorder strengths in a dimerized chain. These findings can deepen the understanding of non-Hermitian physics and establish a new route for disorder-engineered non-Hermitian wave control.

AI.tldr: 本文实验观测了声子晶体中无序非厄米趋肤效应的动力学现象，发现无序依赖的局域化特性，并通过调控二聚化链中的无序强度实现卫星峰的选择性操控。
AI.motivation: 非厄米趋肤效应与无序的相互作用产生了反常的非厄米无序趋肤效应（ENHSE），其无序依赖的局域化特性重塑了传统的体-边对应关系，但目前缺乏直接的实验观测。
AI.method: 在声子晶体中构建具有无序虚数规范场的体系，实验观测其动力学行为，并结合随机游走极值统计理论分析主峰和卫星峰的定位机制。
AI.result: 发现了与激发位置无关的体态无序局域化现象，主峰和卫星峰精确对应于累积规范场的局部极大值；通过调节二聚化链中的交错无序强度，实现了对卫星峰的选择性操控。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现深化了对非厄米物理的理解，并为基于无序工程的非厄米波操控提供了新途径。

title: Wafer-scale hybrid molecular beam epitaxy of BaTiO3 and SrTiO3 on silicon
summary: The integration of epitaxial barium titanate (BTO) on silicon represents a highly promising pathway for next-generation, energy-efficient photonic integrated circuits due to BTO's exceptionally high Pockels coefficients. However, the scalable epitaxy of BTO on Si remains hindered by complex stoichiometric control and slow growth rates. In this work, we demonstrate the continuous, uniform wafer-scale growth of high-quality BTO films on SrTiO3 (STO)-buffered 4-inch Si(001) wafers using a fully hybrid molecular beam epitaxy (hMBE) approach. By utilizing titanium tetraisopropoxide as a titanium precursor, we achieve a self-regulating, adsorption-controlled layer-by-layer growth at rates exceeding 75 nm/h, while maintaining an atomically sharp and structurally coherent BTO/STO interface. We systematically compare the structural, ferroelectric, and electro-optic (EO) properties of fully hMBE-grown BTO with those deposited via pulsed laser deposition (PLD) on identical STO/Si templates. While both techniques yield high-quality c-domain dominated films, the optimized hMBE-grown BTO exhibits superior crystallinity and a larger effective EO coefficient of 248 pm/V, surpassing that of the PLD-grown films (220 pm/V). These results highlight the advantages of the fully hMBE approach as a scalable, deterministic, and high-performance materials platform for wafer-scale integrated ferroelectric photonics.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一种全混合分子束外延（hMBE）方法，在4英寸硅晶圆上实现高质量钛酸钡（BTO）薄膜的晶圆级连续均匀生长，生长速率超过75 nm/h，并获得了优于脉冲激光沉积（PLD）薄膜的电光系数（248 pm/V vs. 220 pm/V），为可规模化集成铁电光子学提供了高性能材料平台。
AI.motivation: BTO因其极高的Pockels系数，是下一代节能光子集成回路的有前景材料，但BTO在硅上的可规模化外延生长受限于复杂的化学计量控制和缓慢的生长速率，亟需一种可规模化、高速率、高质量的BTO薄膜生长方法。
AI.method: 采用全混合分子束外延（hMBE）方法，以四异丙醇钛为钛源前驱体，在STO缓冲的4英寸Si(001)晶圆上进行自调控、吸附控制的逐层生长，实现超过75 nm/h的生长速率，并与脉冲激光沉积（PLD）方法进行系统比较。
AI.result: hMBE实现了原子级尖锐且结构连贯的BTO/STO界面；hMBE生长的BTO薄膜具有更优的结晶度和更大的有效电光系数（248 pm/V），优于PLD薄膜的220 pm/V；两种方法均获得c-domain主导的高质量薄膜。
AI.conclusion: 全hMBE方法是一种可规模化、确定性且高性能的材料平台，适用于晶圆级集成铁电光子学，相较于PLD在结晶质量和电光性能上更具优势。

title: Non-Abelian Particle-Loop, Fracton, and Planon Condensation in Cage-Net Models
summary: We present a framework for non-Abelian p-loop, fracton, and planon condensation in 3+1 dimensions by constructing extended cage-net fracton models using decoupled layers of the Hu-Geer-Wu (HGW) string-net model. These cage-net models extend the conventional cage-net models based on the Levin-Wen (LW) string-net model in the sense that they inherit the tail degrees of freedom of the HGW models, which are essential for completely describing the internal spaces of quasiparticles. This approach allows us to explicitly derive the quasiparticle spectra of the cage-net models by projecting those of the parent 2D HGW layers. Utilizing this framework, we can condense the p-loops formed by non-Abelian anyons within a fracton phase. Specifically, we construct the condensation projector for $(σ\barσ, 1)$-loops within the extended Ising Cage-Net (ICN) model. We demonstrate that condensing these non-Abelian loops drives a phase transition that maps the ICN model to the X-cube (XC) model defined on a truncated cubic lattice, a process that explicitly reveals the splitting of non-Abelian planons into distinct sub-dimensional excitations. Furthermore, our framework extends to the condensation of fractons and planons: we demonstrate that in the ICN model fracton condensation drives the decoupling of the 3D fracton order back into isolated 2D topological order layers, while planon condensation collapses the system entirely into a trivial phase. Our results establish a concrete Hamiltonian mechanism for phase transitions between distinct fracton orders and provide a generalizable method for analyzing the evolution of sub-dimensional excitations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个3+1维非阿贝尔p-loop、fracton和planon凝聚的框架，通过解耦的HGW弦网模型层构建扩展的cage-net分形子模型。该框架允许显式推导准粒子谱，并展示了非阿贝尔环凝聚驱动从ICN模型到X-cube模型的相变，以及分形子和planon凝聚导致的不同相变行为。
AI.motivation: 现有cage-net模型基于Levin-Wen弦网模型，无法完全描述准粒子的内部空间。本文旨在构建基于HGW弦网模型的扩展cage-net模型，以更完整地描述准粒子内部自由度，并实现对非阿贝尔p-loop、fracton和planon凝聚的统一框架分析。
AI.method: 使用解耦的HGW弦网模型层构建扩展的cage-net分形子模型；通过投影父2D HGW层的准粒子谱来导出3D cage-net模型的准粒子谱；构造非阿贝尔(σ\barσ, 1)-环的凝聚投影算子；通过凝聚驱动相变映射ICN模型到X-cube模型。
AI.result: 成功构建了基于HGW模型的扩展cage-net框架，显式推导了准粒子谱；证明了非阿贝尔环凝聚驱动ICN模型到XC模型的相变，揭示了非阿贝尔planon分裂为子维度激发；展示了分形子凝聚使3D分形子序退耦为2D拓扑序层；planon凝聚使系统塌缩为平凡相。
AI.conclusion: 建立了不同分形子序之间相变的哈密顿量机制，提供了一种分析子维度激发演化的通用方法，为非阿贝尔分形子拓扑序的相变研究奠定了基础。

title: Symmetry-Guided Design of Quantum Couplers in Dirac materials: AA-Bilayer Graphene Coupler
summary: We develop a theoretical framework for designing quantum couplers based on Dirac materials that can modulate the polarization of transmitted quasiparticles without significantly perturbing their propagation. We analyze in detail the conditions required for perfect transmission (Klein tunneling) together with controlled polarization transformation of the incoming states. We then discuss an explicit model of a quantum coupler composed of AA-stacked bilayer graphene nanoribbons with armchair edges and a localized interlayer interaction. Perfect transmission through the desired polarization channels is examined for both narrow and wide couplers. We show that the transmission of polarized states can be finely tuned by external fields.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于狄拉克材料的量子耦合器理论框架，可在不显著干扰传播的情况下调控准粒子偏振，并分析了AA堆叠双层石墨烯纳米带中的完美透射与偏振调控机制。
AI.motivation: 设计一种能调控传输准粒子偏振态但又不显著干扰其传播的量子耦合器，现有器件在偏振控制与透射效率间存在权衡。
AI.method: 基于狄拉克材料的理论框架，分析完美透射（Klein隧穿）与偏振变换的条件；构建AA堆叠双层石墨烯纳米带（扶手椅边缘）耦合器模型，引入局域层间相互作用，研究窄/宽耦合器下的偏振通道透射特性。
AI.result: 完美透射可通过特定偏振通道实现，且透射的偏振态可通过外场精细调节，窄/宽耦合器均表现出可调谐的偏振透射行为。
AI.conclusion: 狄拉克材料量子耦合器可在保持高透射率的同时实现偏振的灵活调控，外场调节提供了实际可操作性，为量子信息处理中的偏振控制器件提供新思路。

title: Weak Polar Optical Phonon Scattering Decouples Electron and Phonon Transport in Layered Thermoelectric Materials
summary: High-performance thermoelectric (TE) materials are crucial for efficient waste-heat recovery and solid-state cooling technologies. A persistent challenge in TE materials design arises from the strong interdependence among the electrical conductivity ($σ$), Seebeck coefficient ($S$), and lattice thermal conductivity ($κ_{\mathrm{L}}$). Layered compounds can effectively suppress $κ_{\mathrm{L}}$ along the cross-plane direction owing to weak interlayer interactions; however, they often suffer from low carrier mobility ($μ$) caused by limited band dispersion and strong polar optical phonon (POP) scattering. Here, we perform high-throughput density functional theory calculations to screen 236 layered semiconductors and identify candidates with low effective mass ($m^{*}$) and weak POP scattering. We identify 23 compounds with high cross-plane $μ$, among which 14 exhibit large power factors ($S^{2}σ$). Notably, GaGe$_{2}$Te stands out with exceptionally high cross-plane $σ$ and power factor, enabled by a favorable combination of small $m^{*}$ and a small ionic dielectric constant. Simultaneously, GaGe$_{2}$Te exhibits an ultralow cross-plane $κ_{\mathrm{L}}$ of 0.57~W~m$^{-1}$~K$^{-1}$ at 300~K, originating from weak interlayer bonding and pronounced phonon anharmonicity. These results demonstrate an effective strategy to decouple electron and phonon transport in layered materials by mitigating POP scattering, thereby providing a promising pathway toward high-performance thermoelectric materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高通量密度泛函理论计算筛选了236种层状半导体，识别出23种具有高跨平面迁移率的候选材料，其中GaGe₂Te因低有效质量和弱极性光学声子散射表现出优异的电导率和功率因子，同时具有超低晶格热导率（0.57 W/m·K），实现了电子与声子输运的有效解耦。
AI.motivation: 热电材料设计中电导率、塞贝克系数和晶格热导率之间存在强相互依赖关系，层状化合物虽能抑制热导率但常因低迁移率受限，亟需寻找能同时实现高电导率和低热导率的层状热电材料。
AI.method: 采用高通量密度泛函理论计算，筛选236种层状半导体，评估其有效质量、极性光学声子散射强度、跨平面迁移率及功率因子。
AI.result: 发现23种具有高跨平面迁移率的化合物，其中14种具有大功率因子；GaGe₂Te表现最优，兼具高电导率/功率因子和超低晶格热导率（0.57 W/m·K）。
AI.conclusion: 证明通过降低极性光学声子散射可以有效解耦层状材料中的电子和声子输运，为开发高性能热电材料提供了新策略。

title: Geometry selective colossal negative dielectric permittivity in CaFe2O4 nanostructures
summary: Negative permittivity metamaterial is a scientifically rich avenue due to its tremendous application in several arena of materials research including novel superlens, band-gap materials, invisibility cloaks, antenna and filter design. Traditionally, epsilon negative (ENG) behaviour is achieved in multi-phase composites with the addition of conducting metal fillers. However, this study reports colossal ENG feature in a single phase Calcium Ferrite for a particular nano hollow spherical (NHS) morphology, without the use of any filler. On the contrary, the same material synthesized in a different morphology, namely, nano solid sphere (NSS) shows conventional dielectric behaviour. Occurrence of ENG is successfully interpreted with the phase inversion of dominant polarization within the hollow cavity of NHS. This report marks a significant step in realizing colossal ENG in a single phase material just by restructuring the nanoscale morphology.

AI.tldr: 本研究在单相钙铁石材料中，通过调控纳米空心球形态实现了巨大的负介电常数特性，无需传统导电填料，而相同材料的纳米实心球形态则表现出常规介电行为。
AI.motivation: 传统负介电常数材料需要多相复合和导电填料，本文旨在探索能否在单相材料中仅通过形貌调控实现巨大的负介电常数特性。
AI.method: 合成了钙铁石的两种不同纳米形态——纳米空心球（NHS）和纳米实心球（NSS），对比研究其介电性能差异。
AI.result: 纳米空心球形态的钙铁石展现出巨大的负介电常数（ENG），而相同材料的纳米实心球形态仅表现出常规介电行为。
AI.conclusion: 通过将材料形貌重构为纳米空心球结构，实现了单相材料中巨大的负介电常数，为超材料设计提供了新思路。

title: From Data-Driven Models to Physical Insight: Vibrational Entropy Governed by Atomic Volume
summary:
Vibrational entropy plays a central role in determining phase stability and temperature dependent behavior in materials, yet its calculation from first-principles phonon methods remains computationally demanding. In this work, we combine data-driven modeling with physically motivated analysis to develop an efficient and interpretable framework for predicting vibrational entropy. Using a dataset derived from PhononDB, a feedforward neural network trained on Materials Project and composition based descriptors achieves high predictive accuracy, while SHAP analysis identifies atomic volume as the dominant factor governing vibrational entropy. Guided by this insight, simplified analytical models are constructed, revealing a logarithmic dependence of vibrational entropy on atomic volume consistent with lattice dynamical considerations. A logarithmic linear model is shown to provide an accurate and physically interpretable description across the full range of materials.
  To extend the analysis to finite temperatures, a temperature dependent formulation is introduced that incorporates T3 scaling at low temperatures and logarithmic dependence at higher temperatures, consistent with Debye and Einstein type behavior. This unified model captures both structural and thermal contributions to vibrational entropy with good accuracy. Overall, the proposed framework demonstrates that vibrational entropy can be predicted using simple, physically meaningful relationships, offering a computationally efficient alternative to full phonon calculations and enabling entropy informed materials screening.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数据驱动与物理分析相结合的方法，开发了一个高效且可解释的预测振动熵框架。利用PhononDB数据集和神经网络，发现原子体积是振动熵的主导因素，并建立了对数线性模型。进一步引入温度依赖公式，统一了低温和高温行为，为材料筛选提供了计算高效的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 振动熵对材料相稳定性和温度依赖行为至关重要，但第一性原理声子方法计算振动熵计算成本高昂，亟需开发高效且可解释的预测方法。
AI.method: 1. 基于PhononDB数据集，使用Materials Project描述符训练前馈神经网络进行预测；2. 利用SHAP分析识别原子体积为关键特征；3. 构建简化的对数线性分析模型；4. 引入温度依赖公式，结合低温T³标度与高温对数依赖行为。
AI.result: 神经网络模型取得高预测精度；原子体积被确认为振动熵的主导因素；对数线性模型在全部材料范围内提供了准确的物理可解释描述；统一的温度依赖模型同时准确捕捉了结构贡献和热贡献。
AI.conclusion: 振动熵可以通过简单、物理上有意义的关系进行预测，为全声子计算提供了计算高效的替代方案，支持基于熵的材料筛选。

title: Improved Electrochemical Performance and Diffusion kinetics by Boron-doping in Na$_{0.66}$Mn$_{0.8}$Fe$_{0.2}$O$_{2}$ Layered Cathodes for Sodium-Ion Batteries
summary: We report the electrochemical investigation and study the diffusion kinetics of boron doped Na$_{0.66}$Mn$_{0.8}$Fe$_{0.2}$O$_{2}$ (B-NMFO) cathode materials for sodium-ion batteries. Notably, the B-NMFO cathode exhibits improved specific capacity of 163 mAh g$^{-1}$ as compared to 133 mAhg$^{-1}$ at 0.1~C for the NMFO cathode. Further, we observe better capacity retention of 70\% for B-NMFO as compared to the NMFO (60\%) at 1 C after 200 cycles, indicating high structural stability due to the presence of strong B-O bonds. The diffusion coefficient evaluation through galvanostatic intermittent titration technique and cyclic voltammetry, which is found to be in the range of 10$^{-8}$--10$^{-10}$ cm$^{2}$s$^{-1}$. Interestingly, the temperature dependent distribution of relaxation time (DRT) analysis provides a clear understanding about the individual physical processes occurring at different time domains during the electro-chemical testing. Moreover, density functional theory is employed to determine the energetics and the electronic properties of B-NMFO, which suggests that the interstitial tetrahedral sites, especially those next to vacancies, are the dominant incorporation path ways for B in the host structure. Additionally, classical molecular dynamics (MD) simulations are applied to gain insights into the Na-ion transport properties in the bulk structures cathode materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过硼掺杂改性Na₀.₆₆Mn₀.₈Fe₀.₂O₂（NMFO）正极材料，显著提升了钠离子电池的比容量（163 vs 133 mAh g⁻¹）和循环稳定性（70% vs 60%容量保持率），并结合电化学分析、DFT计算和分子动力学模拟揭示了硼的掺杂机制和钠离子输运特性。
AI.motivation: 提高钠离子电池层状氧化物正极材料的电化学性能，特别是比容量和循环稳定性，通过硼掺杂策略增强结构稳定性。
AI.method: 采用硼掺杂NMFO材料，通过恒电流间歇滴定技术（GITT）、循环伏安法（CV）测定扩散系数；利用温度依赖的弛豫时间分布（DRT）分析解析电化学过程中的物理过程；结合DFT计算掺杂位点与电子性质，并用经典分子动力学（MD）模拟研究钠离子输运行为。
AI.result: B-NMFO在0.1C下比容量达163 mAh g⁻¹（NMFO为133 mAh g⁻¹）；1C循环200次后容量保持率70%（NMFO为60%）；扩散系数范围为10⁻⁸–10⁻¹⁰ cm² s⁻¹；DFT表明硼优先占据间隙四面体空位附近位点。
AI.conclusion: 硼掺杂通过形成强B-O键有效增强了NMFO正极材料的结构稳定性，提升了电化学性能，且DFT和MD模拟为理解掺杂机制和离子输运提供了理论支持。

title: Non-Bloch band theory of nonlinear eigenvalue problems
summary: Nonlinear eigenvalue problems arise in a wide range of physical systems, in which system parameters depend on the eigenvalue. Such systems have been proposed to exhibit an extreme sensitivity of their spectra to boundary conditions, which leads to the breakdown of conventional topological characterizations. In this work, we establish a non-Bloch framework for calculating continuum bands that reproduce the spectra of the nonlinear system with open boundary conditions. This non-Bloch band theory enables us not only to calculate the eigenvalues but also to reveal phenomena unique to the nonlinear system. We further investigate the topological bulk-boundary correspondence in a nonlinear Chern insulator within an extended version of this framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了非线性特征值问题的非Bloch框架，用于计算开放边界条件下的连续谱带，并揭示了非线性系统的独特现象及拓扑体-边界对应关系。
AI.motivation: 非线性特征值问题中，系统参数依赖于特征值，导致谱对边界条件极度敏感，传统拓扑刻画失效，因此需要建立新的理论框架。
AI.method: 建立了非Bloch能带理论框架，用于计算非线性系统中开放边界条件下的连续谱带，并扩展该框架研究拓扑体-边界对应。
AI.result: 该非Bloch框架不仅能够计算特征值，还揭示了非线性系统独有的物理现象。
AI.conclusion: 非Bloch能带理论为非线性系统中的拓扑现象提供了有效刻画手段，拓展了拓扑物理的研究范畴。

title: Electronic Spectroscopy of Atomic Defects in Molybdenum Disulfide under Ambient Conditions
summary: Transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) attract significant attention as potential building blocks in next-generation electronic devices. On the other hand, a comprehensive understanding of how various defects affect local electronic properties under realistic operational conditions is yet to be formed. Here, we present results of electronic spectroscopy experiments performed on individual defects in the prototypical TMD molybdenum disulfide (MoS2) under ambient conditions, by way of conductive atomic force microscopy (C-AFM). Data acquired in the form of consecutive, high-resolution current maps at various bias voltages allow the assessment of local conductivity and differential conductance as a function of bias voltage for individual defects, the effects of which range from single atomic sites to several nanometers in lateral size. Characteristic behavior in spectroscopy data allows the categorization of observed defects into distinct groups, and their chemical identification as n-type and p-type transition metal substitutions of molybdenum atoms, as well as oxygen substitutions of sulfur atoms.

AI.tldr: 本文利用导电原子力显微镜(C-AFM)在环境条件下对二硫化钼(MoS₂)中的单个缺陷进行电子光谱实验，通过高分辨率电流图谱分析不同偏压下单个缺陷的局部电导和微分电导，并对缺陷进行分类和化学识别，包括n型/p型过渡金属取代钼原子以及氧取代硫原子。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属二硫属化物(TMDs)在下一代电子器件中具有重要应用潜力，但对其在实际工作条件下各种缺陷如何影响局部电子特性的全面理解尚未形成。
AI.method: 使用导电原子力显微镜(C-AFM)在环境条件下对MoS₂中单个缺陷进行电子光谱实验，获取不同偏压下的连续高分辨率电流图谱，评估局部电导和微分电导。
AI.result: 实现了对单个缺陷（从单个原子位点到几纳米尺度）局部电导和微分电导的评估，并将缺陷分类为不同组别，化学识别出n型和p型过渡金属取代钼原子以及氧取代硫原子。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一种在环境条件下对TMD材料中单个缺陷进行电学表征和化学识别的有效方法，有助于理解缺陷对器件性能的影响。

title: Structural Colours with Transition Metal Dichalcogenide Nanostructures
summary: We introduce transition metal-dichalcogenide (TMD) nanostructures as a promising platform for the realisation of structural colours. Processing of semianalytically calculated reflectance spectra of TMD nanosphere arrays shows a wide range of colours, which are obtained simply through tailoring the radius and separation of spheres in the array, with the size-dependent Mie modes of the nanoparticles being the primary contributor to the spectra. Additionally, it is demonstrated that further coverage of the colour space can be obtained by employing different materials or different lattice unit cells. Theoretical examination of the impact of the excitonic attributes of TMDs on the resulting structural colours indicates that self-hybridisation between nanoparticle modes and excitonic transitions may be employed for further tuneability. Moreover, the impact of TMD anisotropy on the structural colours is shown to be negligible for small structures at typical viewing angles, while the viewing angle itself may impact the colour. This work sets out to be a general investigation of TMD nanoarchitectures, with a focus on nanosphere arrays, for structural colours, by examining both inherent material features through the lens of colourimetry, and the ability of such structures to sustain a broad range of hues.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了过渡金属二硫族化物（TMD）纳米结构阵列用于实现结构色的可行性与调控机制，通过调控纳米球半径和间距可产生丰富颜色，并探讨了材料、晶格类型、激子耦合及观察角度等因素的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索TMD纳米结构作为结构色新型平台的潜力，利用其尺寸可调的Mie共振模式实现无需化学染料的彩色显示，并挖掘激子自杂化等独特物理特性带来的额外可调性。
AI.method: 采用半解析方法计算TMD纳米球阵列的反射光谱，结合色度学分析，系统考察纳米球半径、间距、不同材料、晶格单元类型、激子特性及各向异性等参数对结构色的影响。
AI.result: 仅通过调整纳米球半径和间距即可获得广泛色域；不同材料和晶格单元可进一步扩展颜色覆盖范围；激子自杂化效应为颜色可调性提供了额外维度；TMD各向异性在小尺寸和典型视角下影响可忽略，但观察角度本身会影响颜色。
AI.conclusion: TMD纳米结构（尤其是纳米球阵列）是一种极具潜力的结构色平台，通过几何参数和材料工程可实现丰富的色彩调控，为无染料彩色显示和光学涂层提供了新的设计思路。

title: Electrical tunability of terahertz nonlinearity in graphene
comment: This is the authors' version of the work. It is posted here by permission of the AAAS for personal use, not for redistribution. The definitive version was published in Science Advances on 7 April 2021; DOI: 10.1126/sciadv.abf9809
summary: Graphene is conceivably the most nonlinear optoelectronic material. Its nonlinear optical coefficients in the terahertz (THz) frequency range surpass those of other materials by many orders of magnitude. This, in particular, allows one to use graphene for extremely efficient up-conversion of sub-THz electronic input signals into the THz frequency range at room temperature and under ambient conditions, thus paving the way for practical graphene-based ultrahigh-frequency electronic technology. Here, we show that the THz nonlinearity of graphene can be efficiently controlled using electrical gating, with gating voltages as low as a few volts. For example, optimal electrical gating enhances the power conversion efficiency in THz third-harmonic generation in graphene by about two orders of magnitude. This essentially converts graphene from an almost perfectly linear, inert electronic material to a material with the highest possible THz nonlinearity. We demonstrate gating control of THz nonlinearity of graphene for both ultrashort single-cycle and quasi-monochromatic multi-cycle input signals. Our experimental results are in quantitative agreement with a physical model of graphene nonlinearity, describing the time-dependent thermodynamic balance maintained within the electronic population of graphene during interaction with ultrafast electric fields. Our results can serve as a basis for straightforward and accurate design of devices and applications for efficient electronic signal processing in graphene at ultra-high frequencies.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过电门控（仅需几伏电压）高效调控石墨烯在太赫兹（THz）频段的非线性光学特性，可将三阶谐波产生的功率转换效率提升约两个数量级，使石墨烯从近乎线性的惰性电子材料转变为具有最高THz非线性特性的材料。
AI.motivation: 石墨烯在太赫兹频段具有极高的非线性光学系数，可用于将亚THz电子输入信号高效上转换至THz频段，推动基于石墨烯的超高频电子技术实用化。然而，如何有效调控这一非线性特性是关键问题。
AI.method: 通过电门控（低至几伏的门控电压）调控石墨烯的THz非线性；实验上使用超短单周期和准单色多周期输入信号；建立描述超快电场下电子群体热力学平衡的物理模型进行定量分析。
AI.result: 电门控可将石墨烯THz三阶谐波产生的功率转换效率提升约两个数量级；石墨烯从近乎线性的惰性材料转变为具有最高THz非线性的材料；实验与物理模型定量吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为在超高频下基于石墨烯的高效电子信号处理器件与应用的直接精确设计提供了基础。

title: Multi-photon schemes for mid-infrared detection
summary: We calculate the theoretical non-degenerate two photon absorption and three color injected current response tensors for bulk GaAs and Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_x$ for a range of alloy compositions. In particular, by including a ''pump'' beam we compare two ''schemes'' that are sensitive to mid-infrared photons. In ''scheme I'' we consider GaAs and a pump photon with energy greater than half the band gap, and in ''scheme II'' we consider Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_x$ with a pump photon with energy less than half the band gap. We find that for certain pump and alloy concentrations Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_x$ has a substantially larger nonlinear response and three-color injected current than GaAs in the mid-infrared frequency window where both materials can absorb photons via non-degenerate two-photon absorption.

AI.tldr: 本文计算了体GaAs和Ge₁₋ₓSnₓ合金的非简并双光子吸收和三色注入电流响应张量，发现Ge₁₋ₓSnₓ在中红外窗口具有更强的非线性响应和三色注入电流。
AI.motivation: 探索新型非线性光学材料在中红外波段的应用可能性，比较GaAs和Ge₁₋ₓSnₓ合金在中红外频率窗口的非线性光学响应。
AI.method: 理论计算非简并双光子吸收和三色注入电流响应张量；设置两种方案：方案I（GaAs，泵浦光子能量>半带隙）和方案II（Ge₁₋ₓSnₓ，泵浦光子能量<半带隙），改变合金组分进行比较。
AI.result: 在特定的泵浦和合金浓度下，Ge₁₋ₓSnₓ在中红外频率窗口（两种材料均可通过非简并双光子吸收吸收光子）具有显著更大的非线性响应和三色注入电流。
AI.conclusion: Ge₁₋ₓSnₓ合金在中红外非线性光学应用中优于传统GaAs材料，具有潜在的应用价值。

title: Singlet-triplet oscillations in multivalley Si double quantum dots
summary: Charge separation from the $(4,0)$ to the $(3,1)$ state in a Si/SiGe double quantum dot is commonly used for initialization of spin qubits and Pauli-spin-blockade readout. It was used in recent experiments involving creation of the $(3,1)$ singlet, and subsequent shuttling of one of the electrons. We present a theoretical description of the process of charge separation and singlet-triplet mixing, arriving at expressions for the singlet return probability that take into account experimentally observed finite probabilities of the creation of singlets with various patterns of valley occupations. In our analysis we focus on magnetic fields for which the electron spin Zeeman splitting is close to the valley splitting in one of the dots, when the spin-valley coupling causes a strong renormalization of the frequency of oscillations of singlet return probability. The latter effect has been recently used to perform valley splitting mapping by shuttling of one quantum dot to various locations with respect to the other. We give a detailed description of singlet-triplet dynamics near these spin-valley resonances and compare the results of calculations with measurements on double quantum dots in two distinct Si/SiGe heterostructures. Comparison of theory with experiments in which the presence of a few valley occupation patterns is visible, gives insight into the valley dependence of $g$-factors in these structures, providing support for a recently proposed theoretical model of this dependence. We also discuss how dephasing of singlet return probability oscillations near the spin-valley resonances is affected by valley splitting fluctuations caused by electric field noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Si/SiGe双量子点中电荷分离与单重态-三重态混合的理论描述，重点关注自旋-谷耦合导致的自旋-谷共振附近的单重态返回概率振荡，并与实验对比验证了g因子的谷依赖性理论模型。
AI.motivation: 理解Si/SiGe双量子点中(4,0)到(3,1)态的电荷分离过程及其对自旋量子比特初始化和Pauli自旋封锁读出的影响，特别是在自旋-谷共振条件下单重态返回概率的振荡行为。
AI.method: 通过理论推导建立电荷分离和单重态-三重态混合的数学模型，得到考虑不同谷占据模式下单重态返回概率的表达式，并与两个不同Si/SiGe异质结构中的双量子点实验测量结果进行对比分析。
AI.result: 成功描述了自旋-谷共振附近单重态返回概率的强烈重整化振荡，解释了通过量子点穿梭进行谷分裂映射的实验现象，并验证了g因子对谷占据模式的依赖性理论模型。
AI.conclusion: 理论模型与实验的吻合揭示了谷依赖的g因子行为，支持了近期提出的g因子谷依赖性理论模型，同时分析了谷分裂涨落对单重态返回概率退相干的影

title: Amorphous High Density Plutonium
summary: Metastable aluminum-alloyed $δ$-plutonium shrinks rapidly and pure $α$-plutonium swells rapidly at 4 K. At ambient temperature alloyed $δ$-plutonium swells about $10^{-3}$ as fast as it shrinks at 4 K, but its bulk density decreases more slowly than would be inferred from the increase in its lattice parameter determined by X-ray diffraction. These results might be explained as the result of ingrowth of the opposite phases, but they have not been found in X-ray diffraction. The cryogenic results may be explained by ingrowth of an amorphous phase with density intermediate between those of $α$ and $δ$. This phase, when formed from alloyed $δ$-plutonium, rapidly but not instantaneously anneals to $δ$-plutonium at temperatures $\gtrapprox 100\,$K; when formed from pure $α$-plutonium it anneals to $α$ at similar temperatures. The room temperature discrepancy between growth of lattice parameter and length of $δ$-plutonium is also explained by ingrowth of a denser amorphous phase that is continuously formed and annealed out.

AI.tldr: 研究了钚的同素异形体（亚稳态δ-钚和α-钚）在低温及常温下的异常体积变化现象，提出了一种非晶相作为中间相来解释密度与晶格参数的矛盾数据。
AI.motivation: 解释δ-钚在4K快速收缩、α-钚快速膨胀，以及常温下δ-钚晶格参数增长与宏观密度下降速率不一致的矛盾现象。
AI.method: 通过对比低温（4K）与常温下的体积变化速率、X射线衍射晶格参数变化，以及密度变化数据，提出非晶相中间体的假设模型。
AI.result: 低温下δ-钚收缩和α-钚膨胀可由密度介于α和δ之间的非晶相生成解释；该非晶相在约100K以上退火恢复为原始相；常温下δ-钚的晶格参数-密度差异由非晶相的持续生成与退火动态平衡解释。
AI.conclusion: 非晶相中间体模型能够统一解释钚在低温与常温下表现出的反常体积变化行为。

title: Spin excitation of the Heisenberg antiferromagnet with frustration: from the bounce-lattice antiferromagnet through the maple-leaf-lattice antiferromagnet to the exact-dimer system
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, to be published in Zeitschrift fur Naturforschung A
summary: The spin-S Heisenberg antiferromagnet on the two-dimensional lattice is investigated for S=1/2 and S=1. We consider interaction at isolated dimers ($J_{\rm d}$) and interaction bonds that form the bounce lattice ($J_{\rm b}$). For $J_{\rm d}=J_{\rm b}$, the system is reduced to the maple-leaf-lattice antiferromagnet. We primarily conduct highly parallelized numerical diagonalization to examine the spin excitation gap above the ground state for various $J_{\rm b}/J_{\rm d}$ cases. For S=1/2, we report calculations for a 42-site cluster that has not been previously treated. The S=1 case is examined for the first time for clusters up to 24 sites. Regardless of whether S=1/2 or 1, we find that the system has a gapped nature for small $J_{\rm d}/J_{\rm b}$ and becomes gapless at $J_{\rm d}/J_{\rm b}\sim 1.4$. For S=1, we also find that another gapped region appears between the gapless case at $J_{\rm d}/J_{\rm b}\sim 1.4$ and the boundary of the exact-dimer phase.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模数值对角化方法，研究了二维自旋S海森堡反铁磁体在S=1/2和S=1时的自旋激发能隙，发现系统在J_d/J_b较小时存在能隙，在约1.4时变为无能隙，且S=1时在无能隙区与精确二聚相之间出现另一个有能隙区域。
AI.motivation: 探究枫叶晶格上不同自旋（S=1/2和S=1）的海森堡反铁磁体的基态性质和自旋激发能隙，特别是研究孤立的二聚体相互作用与反弹晶格相互作用之间的竞争如何影响系统是否能隙或无能隙。
AI.method: 采用高度并行化的数值对角化方法，对42个格点（S=1/2）和最多24个格点（S=1）的团簇进行数值计算，考察不同J_b/J_d比值下的自旋激发能隙。
AI.result: 对于S=1/2和S=1，系统在J_d/J_b较小时具有能隙，在J_d/J_b≈1.4时变为无能隙。此外，对于S=1，在J_d/J_b≈1.4的无能隙区域和精确二聚相边界之间还存在另一个有能隙区域。
AI.conclusion: 枫叶晶格海森堡反铁磁体存在丰富的相图，自旋大小会影响能隙结构的细节，但整体上存在从有能隙到无能隙再到可能有能隙的转变行为。

title: Gate-dependent offset charge shifts and anharmonicity in gatemon qubits in the weak tunneling regime
summary: Gatemon qubits are based on a superconductor-quantum dot-superconductor (S-QD-S) junction which enables in situ electrostatic tuning via a gate electrode. For a single-channel QD this structure gives rise to two subgap Andreev bound states (ABSs), and generally leads to a richer quantum phase dynamics as compared to conventional transmons. In a recent work [Phys. Rev. B 111, 214503 (2025)] we derived the quantum phase dynamics from a many-body treatment which leads to an effective gate voltage-dependent Hamiltonian that self-consistently incorporates the phase quantization. It predicts (i) a renormalization of the junction's effective capacitance and (ii) the presence of gate voltage and occupation-dependent charge offsets in junctions with tunneling asymmetry. Here, we quantify the observable impact of these effects on the qubit's energy spectrum and anharmonicity, by studying the interplay of the two Andreev branches as a function of dot-gate voltages and junction transparencies. We show the relation of these predictions to simplified gatemon models and propose a protocol to experimentally detect the predicted charge offsets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于超导-量子点-超导（S-QD-S）结的Gatemon量子比特，通过多体处理方法推导出有效门电压依赖的哈密顿量，预测了有效电容重整化和电荷偏移，并量化了这些效应对量子比特能谱和非谐性的影响，提出了实验检测方案。
AI.motivation: Gatemon量子比特相比传统transmon具有更丰富的量子相位动力学，而此前对门电压依赖的量子相位动力学缺乏完整的多体处理，因此需要一个自洽的模型来捕获有效电容重整化和电荷偏移等效应。
AI.method: 基于多体处理方法导出门电压依赖的有效哈密顿量，自洽地纳入相位量子化；通过研究两条Andreev分支在不同门电压和结透明度下的相互作用，量化对能谱和非谐性的影响。
AI.result: 预测了结的有效电容重整化以及随门电压和占据数变化的电荷偏移（在隧穿不对称结中）；确定了这些效应对量子比特能谱和非谐性的可观测影响。
AI.conclusion: 这些预测与简化gatemon模型的关系被阐明，并提出了实验检测预测电荷偏移的方案。

title: Magnetic interactions and spin orders in Cr$_8$ and V$_8$ ring-shaped molecular magnets from non-collinear ab initio calculations
summary: We employ density functional theory within a non-collinear framework to investigate the magnetic properties of the octanuclear molecular rings Cr$_8$ and V$_8$. Our aim is to generalize the evaluation of the effective magnetic interactions by explicitly including non-collinear spin configurations, thereby refining our understanding of their dependence upon the underlying electronic structure and molecular geometry. By analyzing the energetics of a variety of magnetic configurations, particularly non-collinear arrangements with neighboring spins oriented along different directions, we move beyond the exchange-only Heisenberg Hamiltonian describing the low-energy sector of the excitation spectrum. This approach enables us to distinguish between in-plane and out-of-plane exchange interactions, and to incorporate biquadratic coupling terms into the effective spin Hamiltonian. We reveal significant antisymmetric exchange interactions of the Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya (DM) type whose dependence on the curvature of the annular structure is clarified by a comparison with the results obtained from linear chains of equal composition. Our work demonstrates that interactions beyond conventional exchange, particularly biquadratic anisotropic terms, in the spin Hamiltonian are essential for accurately capturing the low-energy excitations of these systems. The closest quantitative agreement with experimental results (particularly for the case of Cr$_8$) is achieved when extended Hubbard functionals are used for the evaluation of the effective magnetic couplings.

AI.tldr: 本文利用非共线框架下的密度泛函理论，研究八核分子环Cr₈和V₈的磁性质，通过显式引入非共线自旋构型来推广有效磁相互作用的评估，揭示了超越传统海森堡交换相互作用的Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya型反对称交换和双二次各向异性耦合项，并证明扩展Hubbard泛函能最准确地再现实验数据。
AI.motivation: 传统海森堡哈密顿量仅考虑交换相互作用，无法充分描述低能激发谱。作者旨在通过非共线自旋构型DFT计算，建立更精确的自旋哈密顿量，以捕捉分子环中超出简单交换的复杂磁相互作用（如DM相互作用和双二次耦合），并揭示其与电子结构和几何构型的关系。
AI.method: 采用非共线框架下的密度泛函理论，系统性分析多种自旋构型（特别是非共线排列）的能量特征。通过比较环形结构与线性链的结果，区分面内和面外交换相互作用，并将双二次耦合项纳入有效自旋哈密顿量。同时使用扩展Hubbard泛函评估有效磁耦合。
AI.result: 发现了显著的Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya型反对称交换相互作用，其依赖于环状结构的曲率（通过与线性链对比验证）。揭示了双二次各向异性项对准确描述低能激发的必要性。扩展Hubbard泛函提供的计算结果与实验数据（尤其是Cr₈）最为吻合。
AI.conclusion: 超越传统交换相互作用的耦合项（特别是双二次各向异性项）对于分子环低能激发谱的精确描述至关重要；扩展Hubbard泛函是计算此类体系有效磁耦合的最优选择。

title: Electron-phonon coupling across the TMD/hBN van der Waals interface
summary: Many-body interactions can couple electronic states in one layer with collective excitations in the adjacent layer, providing a route to tailor properties of heterostructures. However, detecting and quantifying interlayer many-body interactions proved a major challenge. Here, we demonstrate that quasiparticles in monolayer transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) are dressed by a remote cloud of phonons in the adjacent hexagonal boron nitride slab. Using angle resolved photoemission, we identify replica bands in the TMDs which are a clear fingerprint of long-range electron-phonon interaction. We develop a modified Fröhlich model that shows semi-quantitative agreement with the experimental spectral functions. Our analysis shows that remote electron-phonon coupling is a generic property of interfaces with hBN. This has implications for electron mobilities in 2D materials, for superconductivity and possibly for moiré correlated phases.

AI.tldr: 本文证明单层过渡金属二硫属化物（TMD）中的准粒子会受到邻近六方氮化硼（hBN）层中远程声子的修饰，并通过角分辨光电子能谱观察到复制带，验证了远程电子-声子耦合是界面的一般特性。
AI.motivation: 层间多体相互作用可以耦合不同层中的电子态与集体激发，从而调控异质结构性质，但检测和量化这种层间多体相互作用一直是一个重大挑战。
AI.method: 利用角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）识别TMD中由远程电子-声子耦合产生的复制带；并改进Fröhlich模型，与实验谱函数进行半定量对比分析。
AI.result: 在TMD中观察到复制带，这是远程电子-声子相互作用的明确指纹；改进的Fröhlich模型与实验结果半定量一致；证明远程电子-声子耦合是hBN界面的通用特性。
AI.conclusion: 该发现对二维材料的电子迁移率、超导性以及可能的莫尔关联相具有重要影响。

title: Modeling the Zero-Phonon Line of Strained SnV Centers in Diamond; Including Reflections on Computational Cost and Accuracy
comment: Manuscript: 12 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables SI: 8 pages, 11 tables
summary: Among the group-IV vacancy color centers in diamond, the SnV holds promise for photonics based quantum applications. In this work, the Tin-Vacancy (SnV) zero-phonon line (ZPL) and its pressure coefficient are calculated using first principles approaches. The predicted absolute ZPL position is shown to be strongly influenced by the method and supercell size used. The results are therefore extrapolated to the dilute limit allowing for direct comparison with experiments. The importance of identifying the color-center related Kohn--Sham states is highlighted, as well as the shifting of these states due to electron excitations as well as supercell size and k-point position. In contrast to the absolute ZPL positions, the relative position of the SnV$^0$ ZPL is consistently redshifted about $43$ nm compared to the SnV$^-$ ZPL. In addition, the pressure coefficient is shown to be very robust over different methods, always resulting in a value of about $1.4$ nm/GPa, for both SnV$^0$ and SnV$^-$. Finally, the computational accuracy and cost are put into perspective.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算预测了金刚石中锡-空位（SnV）色心零声子线（ZPL）的绝对位置及压力系数，发现绝对ZPL位置强烈依赖于方法和超胞尺寸，需外推至稀薄极限才能与实验对比；而相对ZPL位置（SnV^0相比SnV^-约红移43 nm）和压力系数（约1.4 nm/GPa）则表现稳健。
AI.motivation: SnV色心在金刚石中具有光子学量子应用的潜力，但对其ZPL绝对位置和压力系数的精确计算尚不明确，需要第一性原理方法系统评估。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理方法计算SnV的ZPL位置和压力系数，对比不同计算方法和超胞尺寸，并将结果外推至稀薄极限；同时识别与色心相关的Kohn-Sham态及其受电子激发、超胞尺寸和k点位置的影响。
AI.result: 绝对ZPL位置强烈依赖方法和超胞尺寸；SnV^0相对SnV^-的ZPL稳定红移约43 nm；压力系数约为1.4 nm/GPa，对方法不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 计算绝对ZPL位置需谨慎外推，而相对ZPL和压力系数可作为可靠的理论预测；同时需平衡计算精度与成本。

title: Three-dimensional topological ferroelectrics
summary: Three-dimensional (3D) topological ferroelectric (FE) insulators, in which topological and FE orders naturally coexist, enable field-controlled spintronic devices. In this work, we predict a new structure of bismuth monohalides Bi4Br4 and Bi4I4, denoted $γ$ phase, and demonstrate that it is an ideal 3D topological FE insulator. Systematic first-principles calculations confirm the stability and synthesizability of $γ$-Bi4X4 (X=Br, I). Although the noncentrosymmetric $γ$ phase crystallizes in the space group $Cmc2_1$ with no symmetry-based classifications/indicators, the nontrivial topology can be characterized by the spin Chern number (SCN). Spin-resolved Wilson loops show the $s_z$ SCN $C_{s_z}=2$, indicating the spin-resolved topology of a 3D quantum spin Hall insulator state. The $z$-direction polarization can be switched by interlayer sliding, requiring only crossing a small energy barrier. Finally, we design an electrically controlled spin-filter device on bilayer films that can generate a switchable spin-polarized current. Combining a single-phase crystal, a sizable band gap, and robust band topology against FE switching, these bismuth monohalides serve as a prototype of intrinsic 3D topological FE insulators, providing an ideal platform for realizing new nonvolatile functionalities in spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文预测了γ相Bi4Br4和Bi4I4是一种理想的三维拓扑铁电绝缘体，具有大带隙和鲁棒的能带拓扑，可通过层间滑动实现极化翻转，并设计了电控自旋滤波器件。
AI.motivation: 寻找一种能同时实现拓扑序与铁电序自然共存的三维材料，以用于场控自旋电子器件。
AI.method: 通过第一性原理计算预测γ相Bi4X4结构，利用自旋陈数(SCN)和自旋分辨Wilson环表征拓扑性质，通过层间滑动实现铁电极化翻转。
AI.result: γ-Bi4X4稳定且可合成，自旋陈数C_{s_z}=2，具有三维量子自旋霍尔绝缘体态，极化翻转能垒低，并设计了可产生开关式自旋极化电流的双层膜器件。
AI.conclusion: γ相Bi4X4是理想的本征三维拓扑铁电绝缘体，为新型非易失性自旋电子器件提供了理想平台。

title: Attention Is Not All You Need for Diffraction
summary: Determining crystal symmetry from powder X-ray diffraction is a central problem in materials characterization, yet multiple space groups can produce indistinguishable patterns, making automated classification difficult. We show that attention-based architectures, while superior to convolutional networks for this task, are insufficient on their own: reliable symmetry extraction requires encoding crystallographic knowledge into both the network architecture and the training curriculum. We introduce a physics-informed transformer that classifies powder patterns into 99 extinction groups, the most specific symmetry classification accessible from diffraction data alone, using an explicit sin^2(theta) coordinate channel, physics-aware positional encoding, and a structured multi-task decoder that separates geometric rule learning from holistic pattern recognition. A three-stage curriculum of balanced synthetic pretraining, realistic fine-tuning with explicit preferred-orientation modeling, and Bayesian prior injection proves essential for bridging the synthetic-to-real domain gap, while post-hoc temperature scaling rather than additional training is the key remaining ingredient for robust real-data transfer. By mapping predictions onto the directed acyclic graph of maximal translationengleiche subgroups, we show that the calibrated model's errors are not random but physically structured: they remain local on the subgroup hierarchy and flow predominantly toward lower-symmetry descendants, consistent with the physical erasure of systematic-absence cues by real-world noise. These results establish that physics-informed target design, curriculum, and calibrated inference matter as much as model capacity for scientific machine learning on diffraction data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种物理信息增强的Transformer，通过将晶体学知识编码到网络架构和训练课程中，将粉末X射线衍射图案分类为99个消光群，并利用校准推理实现可靠的实数据迁移。
AI.motivation: 粉末X射线衍射中，多个空间群可能产生不可区分的图案，自动分类困难；纯注意力架构虽优于CNN但仍不足，需要注入领域知识。
AI.method: 物理信息Transformer：显式sin²θ坐标通道、物理感知位置编码、结构化多任务解码器；三阶段课程（平衡合成预训练、真实感微调含择优取向建模、贝叶斯先验注入）；事后温度缩放校准。
AI.result: 分类99个消光群；误差在最大平移子群有向无环图中结构性地向低对称性后代流动；校准而非额外训练是实数据迁移的关键。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息的目标设计、课程学习和校准推理与模型容量同等重要，是科学机器学习在衍射数据上的关键原则。

title: Accelerating Quantum Materials Characterization: Hybrid Active Learning for Autonomous Spin Wave Spectroscopy
summary: Autonomous neutron spectroscopy must solve three distinct tasks: detection (where is the signal?), inference (which Hamiltonian governs it?), and refinement (what are the parameters?). No single controller solves all three equally well. We present TAS-AI, a hybrid agnostic-to-physics-informed framework for autonomous triple-axis spin-wave spectroscopy that separates these tasks explicitly. In blind reconstruction benchmarks, model-agnostic methods such as random sampling, coarse grids, and Gaussian-process mappers reach a global error threshold more reliably and with fewer measurements than physics-informed planning, supporting the claim that discovery and inference are distinct tasks requiring distinct controllers. Once signal structure is localized, the physics-informed stage performs in-loop Hamiltonian discrimination and parameter refinement: in a controlled square-lattice test between nearest-neighbor-only and J1-J2 Hamiltonians, TAS-AI reaches a decisive AIC-derived evidence ratio (>100) in fewer than 10 measurements, while motion-aware scheduling cuts wall-clock time by 32% at a fixed measurement budget. We also identify a failure mode of posterior-weighted design, algorithmic myopia, in which the planner over-refines the current leading model while under-sampling low-intensity falsification probes. A constrained falsification channel sharply reduces time spent committed to the wrong model and accelerates correct model selection without modifying the Bayesian inference engine. In controlled two-model ablations, both a deterministic top-two max-disagreement rule and an LLM-based audit committee achieve this gain under identical constraints. We demonstrate the full workflow in silico using a high-fidelity digital twin and provide an open-source Python implementation.

AI.tldr: TAS-AI将中子三轴自旋波光谱学拆解为检测、推理和精炼三个独立任务，采用混合框架（先模型无关后物理信息驱动），在盲重建中模型无关方法更可靠，物理信息阶段能快速区分哈密顿量并优化参数，同时识别了后验加权设计的“算法短视”失败模式并提出约束性证伪通道改进方案。
AI.motivation: 自主中子光谱学需要解决检测、推理和精炼三个不同任务，但单一控制器无法同时胜任所有任务。论文旨在通过显式任务解耦来提升自主光谱学效率。
AI.method: 提出TAS-AI混合框架：第一阶段使用模型无关方法（随机采样、粗网格、高斯过程映射器）进行信号检测和定位；第二阶段采用物理信息驱动方法进行哈密顿量判别和参数精炼。识别算法短视问题后，提出约束性证伪通道（包含确定性top-two最大分歧规则和基于LLM的审计委员会）来加速模型选择。
AI.result: 模型无关方法在盲重建中更可靠且测量次数更少；物理信息阶段在<10次测量内达到AIC证据比>100；运动感知调度节省32%墙钟时间；约束性证伪通道显著减少错误模型时间投入并加速正确模型选择。
AI.conclusion: 将发现与推理任务分离是自主光谱学的有效策略；后验加权设计存在算法短视缺陷；约束性证伪通道是修复该缺陷的有效通用方法，不依赖具体推理引擎。

title: Mapping Reversal Pathways and Interaction Fields in Artificial Spin Ice
summary: In artificial spin ice (ASI), magnetic interactions between nanomagnets determine both the stable states and the switching pathways under an applied field. Here, first-order reversal curve (FORC) measurements are used to map how these interactions govern magnetization reversal in square arrays as the element shape and spacing are varied. The FORC diagrams show that some geometries reverse more uniformly, whereas others exhibit broader, more asymmetric responses, indicating stronger interaction effects and more complex reversal pathways. Combined FORC analysis and micromagnetic simulations also capture subtle changes in internal magnetization textures during switching, linking local behavior within individual elements to collective behavior across the array. These results establish FORC as a practical tool for mapping and engineering interaction landscapes, with direct relevance to reconfigurable magnetic reservoirs and neuromorphic functionality.

AI.tldr: 本文利用一阶反转曲线(FORC)测量和微磁模拟，系统研究了人工自旋冰(ASI)中纳米磁体的形状和间距变化如何影响磁化反转行为，建立了FORC作为映射和工程设计相互作用景观的实用工具，对可重构磁储层和神经形态功能有直接意义。
AI.motivation: 人工自旋冰中纳米磁体间的磁相互作用决定了稳定态和开关路径，但如何系统映射这些相互作用对磁化反转的影响仍缺乏有效手段，因此需要一种实用的工具来表征和工程设计相互作用景观。
AI.method: 采用一阶反转曲线(FORC)测量，结合微磁模拟，通过改变方形阵列中纳米磁体的形状和间距，系统分析不同几何参数下磁化反转行为的变化。
AI.result: 不同几何结构表现出不同的反转均匀性：有些反转更均匀，有些则表现出更宽、更不对称的响应，表明更强的相互作用效应和更复杂的反转路径。FORC分析还能捕捉开关过程中单个元素内部磁化纹理的细微变化。
AI.conclusion: FORC是映射和工程设计相互作用景观的实用工具，对可重构磁储层和神经形态功能具有直接应用价值。

title: Optical Properties of Indium-Gallium-Oxide Microcrystalline Alloy Films: From the Visible to the Deep-UV
summary: The tailored optical properties of $(In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3$ microcrystalline films were studied as a function of composition x via transmission, Urbach energy analysis, and spatial photoluminescence (PL) mapping of the self-trapped hole (STH) emission, with the objective of addressing material characteristics specific to this alloy system. Up to x = 0.46, the optical gap exhibited a redshift of 1 eV from the deep to the near-UV range, while the STH PL was redshifted by 0.5 eV in the visible range. For higher composition, x = 0.63, the transmission spectra indicated the co-existence of two optical gaps attributed to Ga-rich and to In-rich domains, implying that this sample is phase-separated. However, the saturation behavior of the optical gap and that of the STH PL showed that incipient phase separation occurs at a lower composition: x ~ 0.3. This is consistent with the compositional trend found for Urbach energy, implying that phase segregation in the alloys is a major defect even at its incipient stages. Additionally, Urbach analysis of $(In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3$ was compared to that of $Mg_xZn_{1-x}O$. Both systems were found to have similar compositional dependence: at lower range, Urbach energies exhibited a negligible increase, while at the higher range a significant dependence on the composition was found. The main difference between the two alloy systems is in their Urbach energy: those for $(In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3$ were significantly larger than those of $Mg_xZn_{1-x}O$. This stems from the strong hole coupling to phonons of $(In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3$, which provides a dynamic transition additionally to that of defect-type.

AI.tldr: 研究了(In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3微晶薄膜的光学性质随组分x的变化，发现x=0.46时光学带隙红移1 eV至近紫外区，自陷空穴PL红移0.5 eV至可见光区；x=0.63时出现相分离；通过Urbach能和PL的饱和行为识别出早期相分离始于x≈0.3；与Mg_xZn_{1-x}O的Urbach能对比显示前者更大，归因于强空穴-声子耦合。
AI.motivation: 探索(In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3合金体系特有的光学性质及相分离行为，理解组分对光学带隙、自陷空穴发射和缺陷态的影响。
AI.method: 通过透射光谱、Urbach能分析和空间光致发光（PL）映射对自陷空穴（STH）发射进行研究，并与Mg_xZn_{1-x}O进行Urbach能对比。
AI.result: x=0.46时光学带隙红移1 eV，STH PL红移0.5 eV；x=0.63时出现两相共存光学带隙；早期相分离始于x≈0.3；Urbach能显示(In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3比Mg_xZn_{1-x}O更大，且具有相似的组分依赖性。
AI.conclusion: (In_xGa_{1-x})_2O_3合金在x≈0.3即开始出现早期相分离，强空穴-声子耦合导致其Urbach能显著高于Mg_xZn_{1-x}O，动态无序是除缺陷外的重要贡献因素。

title: Nearly Isotropic Magnon Transport in Epitaxial Lithium Aluminum Ferrite Thin Films
summary: Low-loss magnetic insulating thin films are promising for information transport via magnons, where isotropic in-plane magnon propagation is desirable. We report nonlocal measurements of electrically and thermally generated magnons in epitaxial (001) lithium aluminum ferrite Li$_{0.5}$Al$_{0.7}$Fe$_{1.8}$O$_4$ thin films with pronounced fourfold in-plane magnetic anisotropy. By measuring the inverse spin Hall signal as a function of the magnon diffusion distance, we deduce magnon diffusion lengths that are nearly identical along the [100] and [110] directions at 250~K. This isotropy is consistent with a nearly isotropic exchange stiffness. These results highlight spinel ferrites as viable platforms for isotropic magnon transport.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在具有四重面内磁各向异性的锂铝铁氧体薄膜中，沿[100]和[110]方向的磁子扩散长度在250K下几乎相同，表明各向同性的磁子传输，为自旋电子学提供了有前景的平台。
AI.motivation: 低损耗磁性绝缘薄膜有望通过磁子实现信息传输，其中各向同性的面内磁子传播是理想的特性。
AI.method: 在具有显著四重面内磁各向异性的外延(001)锂铝铁氧体薄膜中，通过电学和热学方式产生磁子，利用逆自旋霍尔效应测量非局域信号随磁子扩散距离的变化。
AI.result: 在250K下，沿[100]和[110]方向的磁子扩散长度几乎相同，这种各向同性源于近乎各向同性的交换刚度。
AI.conclusion: 尖晶石铁氧体是实现各向同性磁子传输的可行平台。

title: Room-temperature shape-memory effect in Sr(Ni$_{1-x}$Cu$_x$)$_2$P$_2$
summary: The compound SrNi$_2$P$_2$ can exhibit multiple crystal structures with no P-P pairs bonded (uncollapsed tetragonal, or ucT, state), with one-third of the P-P pairs bonded (one-third collapsed orthorhombic, or tcO, state), or with all P-P pairs bonded (collapsed tetragonal, or cT, state) across the Sr layers. The system can be tuned into its different states by changing temperature, mechanical stress, or chemical composition. Changes in bonding may manifest in changes of macroscopic properties of the material, such as its shape, electrical conductivity, or magnetism. In this work, we show that SrNi$_2$P$_2$ can be tuned among the three states by changing Cu substitution and temperature. We present temperature-dependent resistance and single-crystal x-ray diffraction results in Sr(Ni$_{1-x}$Cu$_x$)$_2$P$_2$ single-crystals that show that Cu substitution favors the P-P bonding, stabilizing the cT state at ambient pressure. We construct a $T-x$ phase diagram that shows how all of these transition temperatures increase with increasing Cu fraction, $x$. The transition between the tcO state and the cT state exhibits a very large thermal hysteresis, which can be tuned to temperatures close to room temperature. In particular, the properties of Sr(Ni$_{0.963}$Cu$_{0.037}$)$_2$P$_2$ may make it suitable for applications as a shape memory material at room temperature.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了SrNi₂P₂化合物通过Cu替代和温度调控，在三种晶体结构（未塌缩四方相ucT、部分塌缩正交相tcO、完全塌缩四方相cT）之间的转变，构建了T-x相图，并发现特定组分的材料在室温附近具有形状记忆应用的潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索如何通过化学替代和温度调控来调节SrNi₂P₂在不同晶体结构间的转变，特别是寻找具有实际应用价值的室温形状记忆材料。
AI.method: 制备Sr(Ni₁₋ₓCuₓ)₂P₂单晶，进行变温电阻测量和单晶X射线衍射实验，构建温度-组分（T-x）相图。
AI.result: Cu替代有利于P-P成键，稳定cT态；所有相变温度随Cu含量x增加而升高；tcO到cT的转变表现出很大的热滞，可调至接近室温。
AI.conclusion: Sr(Ni₀.₉₆₃Cu₀.₀₃₇)₂P₂的相变特性使其有望用作室温形状记忆材料。

title: Interfacial breathing as a dynamic failure law in all-solid-state batteries: amplitude, phase lag and dual-timescale memory as design principles
summary: All-solid-state batteries fail not only by bulk transport limits, but by a reactive interface that evolves during cycling. We show that degradation is governed by two coupled processes: interfacial breathing, the cycle-scale oscillation of lithium contact, and reactive memory, the slow accumulation of electrolyte decomposition. Four descriptors capture breathing, together with a memory metric based on decomposed interphase thickness. A reduced electrochemical benchmark shows that ionic conductivity has little effect on mean discharge voltage, whereas cathode electrolyte interphase resistance causes major voltage and energy losses. A phase-field model of a sulfide-based cell shows that higher stack pressure strongly suppresses breathing-related fluctuations, but leaves reactive memory nearly unchanged. Thus, pressure controls breathing, not memory. The resulting regime map identifies void-growth-dominant, healing-dominant, and interphase-memory-dominant regions. The theory also predicts energy-density rank inversion with C rate, where an initially superior architecture loses advantage at higher rate as breathing intensifies and interphase memory locks in. The design target is therefore not merely higher conductivity or lower resistance, but simultaneous suppression of breathing and independent control of reactive memory through interphase chemistry.

AI.tldr: 全固态电池的退化由界面呼吸（循环尺度锂接触振荡）和反应记忆（电解质分解缓慢累积）两个耦合过程主导。压力控制呼吸而非记忆，设计目标需同时抑制呼吸并独立控制反应记忆。
AI.motivation: 揭示全固态电池除体相传输限制外，由反应性界面演化导致的退化机制，并量化呼吸与记忆两个耦合过程的影响。
AI.method: 提出四个描述呼吸的指标和一个基于分解界面厚度的记忆度量；建立降阶电化学基准模型；构建硫化物基电池的相场模型。
AI.result: 离子电导率对平均放电电压影响甚微；阴极电解质界面电阻导致主要电压和能量损失；高堆压抑制呼吸波动但不改变反应记忆；识别出三种退化主导区域；预测能量密度等级随C率反转。
AI.conclusion: 设计目标并非单纯追求高电导率或低电阻，而须同时抑制界面呼吸并独立调控反应记忆（通过界面化学）。

title: Understanding Damping Mechanisms via Spin Diffusion Length in Low-damping Li$_{0.5}$Al$_{1.0}$Fe$_{1.5}$O$_4$ Spinel Ferrite Thin Films
summary: The mechanisms underlying magnon damping are of fundamental and technological interest in low-damping materials. We find low-damping ferrimagnetic insulator Li$_{0.5}$Al$_{1.0}$Fe$_{1.5}$O$_4$ (LAFO) thin films to be a promising model system for probing these mechanisms because of its distinct temperature dependent spin diffusion length (SDL) trends for electrically and thermally generated magnons. With increasing temperature, the electrical SDL shows minimal change, while the thermal SDL decreases. We attribute these trends to distinct magnon populations and scattering mechanisms: thermally generated high $k$ magnons are limited by magnon-phonon scattering, whereas electrically generated low $k$ magnons are limited by relaxational scattering from magnetic impurities.

AI.tldr: 研究发现低阻尼铁氧体绝缘薄膜Li$_{0.5}$Al$_{1.0}$Fe$_{1.5}$O$_4$ (LAFO)中，电学和热学生成的磁子表现出不同的自旋扩散长度温度依赖性，归因于不同磁子群体和散射机制：高热k磁子受磁子-声子散射限制，低k磁子受磁杂质弛豫散射限制。
AI.motivation: 探究低阻尼材料中磁子阻尼的潜在机制，寻找理想模型系统以区分不同散射贡献。
AI.method: 以LAFO薄膜为模型体系，对比测量电学和热学方式产生的磁子的自旋扩散长度随温度的变化趋势。
AI.result: 电学自旋扩散长度随温度变化极小，而热学自旋扩散长度随温度升高而减小。
AI.conclusion: 不同k值磁子受不同散射机制主导：高k热磁子受磁子-声子散射限制，低k电磁子受磁杂质弛豫散射限制。

title: Characterizing Fill Factor Limitations in Perovskite-Silicon Tandem Solar Cells
summary: Perovskite-silicon tandem technology has exceeded the single junction theoretical efficiency limit. However, there is still distance to the thermodynamic limit mainly caused by the fill factor. This work presents a methodology to illustrate the mechanisms of FF loss in perovskite-Si monolithic tandem solar cells. Apart from the series resistance related loss characterized by electroluminescence, another loss factor is from the photoshunt, a phenomenon in which the parallel resistance apparently reduces under illumination in perovskite solar cells due to the moderate charge transport layer mobility. In addoition, the two-diode property of the Si cell can also influence the FF of tandem devices. The photoshunt can be hidden when the bottom cell is over illuminated, which explains highly efficient tandem solar cells are usually bottom cell limited. This work outlines strategies that overcoming the photoshunt issue can move the perovskite top cell closer to low FF losses in tandem solar cells.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了钙钛矿-硅叠层太阳能电池中限制填充因子的关键机制——光分流现象（光照下并联电阻降低），并指出当底电池过照明时该现象会被掩盖，解释了高效叠层电池通常受限于底电池的原因。
AI.motivation: 尽管钙钛矿-硅叠层电池已超越单结理论效率极限，但距离热力学极限仍有差距，主要原因在于填充因子（FF）损失。本文旨在阐明FF损失的机制，为突破效率瓶颈提供指导。
AI.method: 提出了一套分析方法来展示钙钛矿-硅单片叠层太阳能电池中FF损失的机理：通过电致发光表征串联电阻损失，并识别出光分流（光致并联电阻降低）作为另一关键损失因素，同时考虑硅电池的双二极管特性对FF的影响。
AI.result: 发现光分流现象源于钙钛矿电池中中等电荷传输层迁移率，导致并联电阻在光照下明显降低；硅电池的双二极管特性也会影响叠层器件的FF；当底电池过照明时，光分流效应被隐藏，解释了高效叠层电池通常为底电池限制型。
AI.conclusion: 克服光分流问题是使钙钛矿顶电池在叠层电池中实现低FF损失的关键策略。

title: Phase transformation kinetics in MoS2 governed by S-S repulsive interactions and defect-interface compatibility
summary: The metastable T' phase in monolayer MoS2 exhibits remarkable persistence despite a strong thermodynamic driving force toward the stable H phase. Using machine learning-accelerated molecular dynamics and first-principles calculations, we reveal that this kinetic arrest originates from repulsive S-S interactions, which impose high energy barriers during both nucleation and grain boundary propagation. While sulfur vacancies can alleviate these barriers in certain interfaces, they fail to accelerate transformation at the most stable interface, ZZ-Mo|-, due to their thermodynamic instability there. Instead, vacancies migrate into the T' phase, leaving the advancing front defect-free. Direct simulations of nanostructures confirm that H-phase nucleation initiates at corners or edges, and all observed growth fronts adopt the ZZ-Mo|- configuration, consistent with its low interfacial energy but slow kinetics. Our work establishes that phase transformation in 2D materials is governed not by global defect concentration, but by the local compatibility between defects and moving interfaces, offering a new paradigm for controlling structural transitions through interface-specific design.

AI.tldr: 单层MoS₂中亚稳态T'相到稳定H相的转变受限于S-S排斥作用产生的高能垒，空位缺陷在特定界面上无法加速相变，相变受限于局部界面-缺陷兼容性而非全局缺陷浓度。
AI.motivation: 揭示单层MoS₂中T'相异常动力学稳定的微观机制，理解为何在强热力学驱动力下相变仍被抑制。
AI.method: 机器学习加速分子动力学模拟 + 第一性原理计算，研究T'→H相变的成核与晶界传播过程。
AI.result: S-S排斥作用是动力学稳定的根源；空位缺陷在ZZ-Mo|-界面热力学不稳定，无法加速相变；H相成核始于拐角/边缘，生长前沿均为ZZ-Mo|-构型。
AI.conclusion: 二维材料相变由缺陷与移动界面的局部兼容性控制，而非全局缺陷浓度，为界面特异性设计调控结构相变提供新范式。

title: Nitrogen doping induced metal-insulator transition with iso-symmetric character in rutile VO2
summary: Metal-insulator transitions (MITs) in correlated oxides offer immense potential for next-generation Mottronic devices. However, their integration into practical applications is often hindered by the coupling of MITs with symmetry-lowering structural phase transitions, which limits switching speed and endurance. In this study, we engineered an iso-symmetric MIT on average in epitaxial rutile VO2 thin films via an in-situ nitrogen doping strategy. Nitrogen incorporation effectively suppresses V-V dimerization, enabling an iso-symmetric MIT, while preserving the original crystal symmetry. Furthermore, in-operando time-resolved optical reflectivity measurements revealed a shortened switching time in nitrogen-doped films, highlighting their enhanced performance. Our findings provide critical insights into the underlying mechanisms of MITs and introduce anion doping as a powerful tool for tailoring phase transitions in strongly correlated electron systems. This approach opens new avenues for the development of high-performance electronic and photonic devices.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过氮掺杂策略在二氧化钒薄膜中实现了等对称金属-绝缘体相变，抑制了V-V二聚化，缩短了开关时间，为高性能Mottronic器件开发提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 金属-绝缘体相变在关联氧化物中具有巨大的Mottronic器件潜力，但其与对称性降低的结构相变耦合限制了开关速度和耐久性，亟需解耦这两种相变以实现高性能应用。
AI.method: 在异质外延金红石相VO2薄膜中采用原位氮掺杂策略，通过氮掺入抑制V-V二聚化，实现平均意义上的等对称金属-绝缘体相变，并利用时间分辨光学反射率测量评估开关性能。
AI.result: 氮掺杂有效抑制了V-V二聚化，实现了等对称金属-绝缘体相变并保持原始晶体对称性；时间分辨测量表明氮掺杂薄膜的开关时间显著缩短，性能得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了金属-绝缘体相变的内在机制，展示了阴离子掺杂作为调控强关联电子体系中相变的有效工具，为高性能电子和光子器件开发开辟了新途径。

title: Atomistic Mechanisms of Temperature-Dependent Ion Track Formation in Gallium Nitride under Swift Heavy Ion Irradiation
summary: The radiation tolerance of gallium nitride under extreme conditions is critical for its deployment in next-generation electronic and optoelectronic devices, yet the microscopic mechanisms governing swift heavy ion induced damage at elevated temperatures remain poorly understood. Therefore, this study employs a coupled approach including the two-temperature model and molecular dynamics simulations to resolve the entire processes of ion track generation induced by swift heavy ions irradiation across a wide temperature range. A temperature-driven morphological transition of ion tracks, evolving from discontinuous segments to continuous tracks composed of isolated nanobubbles, and ultimately to fully continuous channels is observed. Under lower electronic stopping loss of 430 MeV Kr irradiation, increasing temperature significantly enhances track visibility, enlarges track radii and promotes nanobubble formation.
